reviews.author: Zu Ekpunobi (Dr. Zu)
reviews.text:
Overall, 4.3/5 but I'll round away up. Definitely, Hutong is worth the visit. A hole-in-the-wall feel Chinese restaurant that feels more like a speakeasy than a formal dining arrangement, Hutong brings ambience and down tempo flair to the bustling engagement of the downtown core.

Service knowledge and flow and speed of dish preparation could definitely be improved. Either they no longer have the spicy beef noodle soup or the server was completely lost, but she has no idea what I was referring to when I mentioned the dish -- one of Hutongs most popular dishes.

Garlic green beans were a bit. Dan Dan noodles were ok but a little plain/not saucy enough. Sesame balls were delicious also, albeit small.

Overall, is recommend a visit. Just make sure to carve out a ton of time to find parking. Kinda tough did to location
reviews.textTranslated:
Secara keseluruhan, 4,3/5 tapi akan saya bulatkan ke atas. Hutong benar-benar layak dikunjungi. Restoran Cina sederhana yang lebih mirip bar rahasia daripada tempat makan formal, Hutong menghadirkan suasana dan nuansa santai di tengah hiruk pikuk pusat kota.

Pengetahuan pelayanan dan kecepatan serta kelancaran penyajian hidangan jelas perlu ditingkatkan. Entah mereka sudah tidak menyediakan sup mie daging sapi pedas lagi atau pelayannya benar-benar kebingungan, karena dia tidak tahu apa yang saya maksud ketika saya menyebutkan hidangan itu -- salah satu hidangan paling populer di Hutong.

Kacang hijau bawang putih agak kurang. Mie Dan Dan lumayan, tapi agak hambar/kurang saus. Bola wijen juga enak, meskipun ukurannya kecil.

Secara keseluruhan, saya merekomendasikan untuk berkunjung. Pastikan untuk meluangkan banyak waktu untuk mencari tempat parkir. Agak sulit karena lokasinya.

reviews.author: Tim White
reviews.text: What an experience. Authentic. Such hospitality and flavors!!!’ Service is excellent. Atmosphere so comfy.
reviews.textTranslated: Sungguh pengalaman yang luar biasa. Otentik. Keramahtamahan dan cita rasanya sungguh luar biasa!!! Pelayanannya sangat baik. Suasananya sangat nyaman.

reviews.author: T T
reviews.text: Got food sickness from here.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya kena penyakit perut setelah makan di sini.

reviews.author: Aaron Kelly
reviews.text: Incredible atmosphere. Perfect food. Great service. Possibly the best dining experience I’ve had in madison.
reviews.textTranslated: Suasananya luar biasa. Makanannya sempurna. Pelayanannya luar biasa. Mungkin ini pengalaman bersantap terbaik yang pernah saya alami di Madison.

reviews.author: Dan Pyro
reviews.text: My daughter craves the DanDan noodles - SPICY!! Whatever you do. you gotta save room for dessert, get the Sesame Balls and eat them while they're hot! Absolutely amazing!!
reviews.textTranslated: Putriku ngidam mi DanDan - PEDAS!! Apa pun yang kamu lakukan, kamu harus sisakan ruang untuk pencuci mulut, ambil Bola Wijen, dan makan selagi panas! Luar biasa!

reviews.author: B.
reviews.text: 招牌面和饭都很香 桂花椰子冻也好吃 希望之前的面和烤串能回归 愿有幸能吃到
reviews.textTranslated: Mi dan nasi khasnya lezat, dan jeli kelapa osmanthusnya juga lezat. Saya harap mi dan sate bakarnya akan kembali lagi; semoga saya punya kesempatan untuk memakannya lagi.

reviews.author: Molly Curran
reviews.text: I came tonight and enjoyed great portion size for price, quick + friendly service, and yummy tea! Try the cucumber salad- super fresh and easy appetizer. Great local authentic Chinese option.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya datang malam ini dan menikmati porsi yang pas dengan harganya, pelayanan yang cepat dan ramah, serta teh yang lezat! Cobalah salad mentimunnya - hidangan pembuka yang super segar dan mudah. ​​Pilihan hidangan Cina lokal otentik yang luar biasa.

reviews.author: Thomas Preston
reviews.text: Spicy food that is actually spicy.  Yay!  Festive but intimate atmosphere.  Nice people serving.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan pedas yang benar-benar pedas. Hore! Suasana meriah namun intim. Orang-orangnya ramah melayani.

reviews.author: Fong Liew
reviews.text: I would highly recommend their noodle dishes. I ordered the beef noodle and was really happy with it. My boyfriend ordered a rice bowl, at a noodle place, and was disappointed as you would expect. Great service and they placed us by the window which kept us entertained watching an array of different people walk by.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sangat merekomendasikan hidangan mi mereka. Saya memesan mi daging sapi dan sangat puas. Pacar saya memesan nasi mangkuk di tempat makan mi, dan kecewa seperti yang bisa diduga. Pelayanannya bagus dan mereka menempatkan kami di dekat jendela yang membuat kami terhibur menyaksikan berbagai macam orang yang lewat.

reviews.author: Jim Wagner
reviews.text: Small menu and on Friday night 2 entrees and a draft beer were not available. Noodle dishes were unimpressive.
reviews.textTranslated: Menunya terbatas dan pada Jumat malam, 2 hidangan utama dan bir draft tidak tersedia. Hidangan mi-nya kurang mengesankan.

reviews.author: Yuhui Ma
reviews.text: Good flavors overall, a bit too salty (maybe too much msg in my opinion. Coconut jelly was delicious as dessert!!
reviews.textTranslated: Secara keseluruhan rasanya enak, agak terlalu asin (mungkin terlalu banyak MSG menurut saya). Puding kelapa sangat lezat sebagai hidangan penutup!!

reviews.author: E O
reviews.text:
Beef noodle soup tasted like doctored up ramen. Veggies and over cooked thinly sliced beef added. Portions were small. Not worth the $20. Left hungry and disappointed. The single server was slammed and did a good job of keeping up and getting me taken care of. I likely won’t be back.

EDIT: Adjusted my review lower to reflect response from owner. That certainly is one way to respond to criticism. Best of luck with that.
reviews.textTranslated:
Sup mie daging sapi rasanya seperti ramen yang diolah ulang. Ditambah sayuran dan irisan daging sapi tipis yang terlalu matang. Porsinya kecil. Tidak sepadan dengan harga $20. Pulang dengan perut lapar dan kecewa. Pelayan yang melayani sendirian itu sangat sibuk dan berhasil mengatasi situasi serta melayani saya dengan baik. Kemungkinan besar saya tidak akan kembali lagi.

EDIT: Saya menurunkan peringkat ulasan saya untuk mencerminkan tanggapan dari pemilik. Itu tentu saja salah satu cara untuk menanggapi kritik. Semoga berhasil.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Eric, 
I'm sorry that you didn't like our beef noodle soup as Gong Yi, who gave as a Two Stars review with his partner Tatiana a day before you visited us. It was unluck you didn't like the flavor of our beef noodle soup, so it did worth nothing to you. 
We appreciate you compliment our server- Erin. Our teams are awesome!!! Quote to Erin, if you could tell her your real thought in person rather than said "everything is good", and then leave a 2 stars review after out of our door, we'll be more appreciated to trying provide other satisficed solution with you.

reviews.author: Chase
reviews.text: Great dan-dan noodles. Pretty spicy but still very flavorful.
reviews.textTranslated: Mie dan-dan yang enak sekali. Agak pedas tapi tetap sangat lezat.

reviews.author: Jyoti
reviews.text: This place is a gem of a restaurant. The food, the atmosphere, the drinks are all 10/10. One of the only places in Madison I have seen tofu skins so that alone got me in the door. A lot of the small plates are vegetarian/vegan. Everything we have tried in our two visits there has been excellent - potstickers, green beans, tofu skins, scallion pancakes. They have specials that also sound great. Service on a busy night is a little slow, as can be expected. Would recommend a reservation as they are not a huge place and fill up quickly. Highly recommend having a meal here!
reviews.textTranslated: Restoran ini benar-benar luar biasa. Makanan, suasana, dan minumannya semuanya sempurna (10/10). Ini salah satu dari sedikit tempat di Madison yang pernah saya lihat menyajikan kulit tahu, jadi itu saja sudah cukup membuat saya tertarik. Banyak menu kecilnya vegetarian/vegan. Semua yang kami coba dalam dua kunjungan kami ke sana sangat enak - pangsit goreng, buncis, kulit tahu, dan panekuk daun bawang. Mereka juga memiliki menu spesial yang terdengar lezat. Pelayanan di malam yang ramai agak lambat, seperti yang bisa diharapkan. Saya sarankan untuk melakukan reservasi karena tempatnya tidak terlalu besar dan cepat penuh. Sangat merekomendasikan untuk makan di sini!

reviews.author: Iris Pastena
reviews.text: The food was super good. Little slow to bring things out, but not really a problem. Wacky cocktails. I will definitely be back!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya sangat enak. Agak lambat dalam penyajiannya, tapi bukan masalah besar. Koktailnya unik. Saya pasti akan kembali lagi!

reviews.author: Mike
reviews.text: We love this little place.   Great small plates and Korean desserts.  Nice jinro and Asian teas as well.
reviews.textTranslated: Kami suka tempat kecil ini. Piring-piring kecil dan hidangan penutup Korea-nya enak. Jinro dan teh Asia-nya juga enak.

reviews.author: Andrew Lien
reviews.text: Overpriced American Chinese food. Ordinary ramen noodles, sauces are cornstarch instead of oil, strong but wrong flavor profiles. The skewers are probably the best thing there, but even then the meat, while cooked well, is unflavored, all the flavor sits on top as sauce.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan Cina Amerika yang terlalu mahal. Mie ramen biasa, sausnya pakai tepung maizena, bukan minyak, kuat tapi kurang pas rasanya. Tusuk sate mungkin yang terbaik di sana, tapi meskipun begitu, dagingnya, meskipun matang sempurna, tetap hambar, semua rasa meresap ke atas sebagai saus.

reviews.author: Turner Valle
reviews.text: Delicious. I had the dan dan lamb special. Would love to come back
reviews.textTranslated: Enak sekali. Saya pesan Dan Dan Lamb Special. Mau balik lagi nih.

reviews.author: Mary Beth Lawler
reviews.text: Tucked away gem! If you are living or visiting Madison visit this place! Great food! I come here every time I am in town. Specials are highly suggested trust this chef! Small plates egg rolls and dumplings you want to have! Had the sweet sliced beef rice so good! Soups are so yummy!
reviews.textTranslated: Permata tersembunyi! Jika Anda tinggal atau sedang mengunjungi Madison, kunjungi tempat ini! Makanannya enak! Saya selalu ke sini setiap kali ke kota ini. Menu spesial sangat direkomendasikan, percayalah pada koki ini! Lumpia dan pangsit dengan piring kecil yang pasti Anda ingin makan! Nasi daging sapi iris manisnya sangat lezat! Supnya juga sangat lezat!

reviews.author: Steven Leech
reviews.text: Wow!  I can not recommend this place enough!  Super sweet family run operation with a longtime staff that are happy to have you!
reviews.textTranslated: Wow! Saya sangat merekomendasikan tempat ini! Usaha keluarga yang sangat ramah dengan staf yang sudah lama bekerja dan senang menyambut Anda!

reviews.author: Peter Deisinger
reviews.text: We loved every dish. We will be coming back ASAP. Our server was stellar - super welcoming and knowledgeable about the menu. Incredible value for the quality of food, too!
reviews.textTranslated: Kami menyukai setiap hidangan. Kami akan kembali secepatnya. Pelayan kami luar biasa - sangat ramah dan berpengetahuan tentang menu. Nilai yang luar biasa untuk kualitas makanannya juga!

reviews.author: Hailey Appenzeller
reviews.text: They have a fairly limited menu, but everything I’ve tried here is very good. However, the must-try dish (in my opinion) is the spicy beef noodle soup! Especially in winter, this is the perfect rich, spicy, complex soup. I’ve tried making it at home before and it is definitely a labor of love. The atmosphere of the restaurant is very cozy as well. I would encourage everyone to check it out!
reviews.textTranslated: Menu mereka agak terbatas, tetapi semua yang pernah saya coba di sini sangat enak. Namun, hidangan yang wajib dicoba (menurut saya) adalah sup mie daging sapi pedas! Terutama di musim dingin, ini adalah sup yang kaya rasa, pedas, dan kompleks yang sempurna. Saya pernah mencoba membuatnya di rumah sebelumnya dan itu benar-benar membutuhkan banyak usaha. Suasana restorannya juga sangat nyaman. Saya sangat menyarankan semua orang untuk mencobanya!

reviews.author: Kari Eggert
reviews.text: This place is crazy good. We had the Beef Rice, Shrimp Buns, and Vegetable Spring Roll. Everything was amazing and the atmosphere is cute and cozy. Service was excellent. Highly recommend.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini benar-benar luar biasa. Kami memesan Nasi Daging Sapi, Bakpao Udang, dan Lumpia Sayur. Semuanya luar biasa dan suasananya nyaman dan menyenangkan. Pelayanannya luar biasa. Sangat direkomendasikan.

reviews.author: WT B
reviews.text: Food is a bit pricy for the taste and quality. Noodle was machined. Waitresses chat too much and forgot orders of mine and next table's at non-rush hour. But the place is cozy.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan agak mahal untuk rasa dan kualitasnya. Mienya dibuat menggunakan mesin. Pelayan terlalu banyak mengobrol dan lupa pesanan saya dan meja sebelah di luar jam sibuk. Tapi tempatnya nyaman.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi WT, thank you for the review!

reviews.author: lara banks
reviews.text: Yum!
reviews.textTranslated: Enak!

reviews.author: Cory Moy
reviews.text: Was I pranked? I am seeing the word “authentic” in the other reviews and I am perplexed. Nothing about my experience was authentic. I am 90% sure the dan dan noodles used Buldak instant ramen hot sauce, and 95% sure the chicken was tossed in ketchup. 夫妻肺片 was totally off the mark. Just because it’s not the “orange chicken experience” doesn’t make it authentic. I would say the food is improvising with Sichuanese concepts but not good. The cooking has some major growing edges, but these reviews are an insult to Chinese cuisine.
reviews.textTranslated: Apakah saya dikerjai? Saya melihat kata "asli" di ulasan lain dan saya bingung. Tidak ada yang benar-benar asli dari pengalaman saya. Saya 90% yakin mi dan dan menggunakan saus pedas ramen instan Buldak, dan 95% yakin ayamnya dilumuri saus tomat. 夫妻肺片 benar-benar meleset. Bukan karena rasanya seperti "ayam jeruk", bukan berarti rasanya asli. Saya rasa makanannya memang diimprovisasi dengan konsep Sichuan, tapi tidak enak. Masakannya memang agak berlebihan, tetapi ulasan-ulasan ini merupakan penghinaan terhadap masakan Tiongkok.

reviews.author: Man Lee
reviews.text: If pork fried rice is considered as dim sum , then all Chinese takeout is dim sum restaurants. This place is not considered as dim sum restaurant unless you never tried dim sum before. This may be a faulty advertising.
reviews.textTranslated: Jika nasi goreng babi dianggap sebagai dim sum, maka semua restoran makanan Cina yang dibawa pulang adalah restoran dim sum. Tempat ini tidak dianggap sebagai restoran dim sum kecuali Anda belum pernah mencoba dim sum sebelumnya. Ini mungkin iklan yang keliru.

reviews.author: Thomas Kasl
reviews.text: Had a dinner for two. We thoroughly enjoyed the panko shrimp and squid (calamari). The garlic green beans were out of this world delicious. The spicy beef broth could've been spicier but was still good. The hot tea (peach oolong) was delightful. We finished with a unique and refreshing coconut dessert (pictured)!
reviews.textTranslated: Kami makan malam berdua. Kami sangat menikmati udang panko dan cumi-cumi (calamari). Tumis kacang hijau bawang putihnya sangat lezat. Kaldu sapi pedasnya bisa lebih pedas lagi, tapi tetap enak. Teh panasnya (oolong persik) sangat nikmat. Kami menutup makan malam dengan hidangan penutup kelapa yang unik dan menyegarkan (seperti yang terlihat di gambar)!

reviews.author: Khoi Nguyen
reviews.text:
I got the beef noodle soup, the chicken skewer special, and the scallion pancakes. Objectively food was pretty good, 7/10 for the skewers, 7.5/10 for the scallion pancake, and 7.8/10 for the beef noodle soup.
But the dish didn't taste authentic to me. The beef noodle soup tasted more like a tonkotsu ramen than a beef noodle soup. Even the color of the broth resembles it more. I came in expecting to get chinese beef noodle soup, so I was very disappointed. I wish the restaurant had hoisin sauce for the scallion pancakes as well.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya memesan sup mi sapi, sate ayam spesial, dan panekuk daun bawang. Secara objektif, makanannya cukup enak, 7/10 untuk sate, 7,5/10 untuk panekuk daun bawang, dan 7,8/10 untuk sup mi sapi.
Tapi rasanya kurang autentik menurut saya. Sup mi sapinya lebih mirip ramen tonkotsu daripada sup mi sapi. Bahkan warna kuahnya pun lebih mirip. Saya datang dengan harapan akan memesan sup mi sapi ala Cina, jadi saya sangat kecewa. Saya berharap restorannya juga menyediakan saus hoisin untuk panekuk daun bawangnya.

reviews.author: Caitlin Vanover
reviews.text: Absolutely loved our first time at Hutong! Enjoyed two of the specials - pork bao buns and the lamb dan dan noodles. The server graciously warned me that the dan dan would be very spicy and I like spicy food so I appreciated the warning and can attest...it was very spicy and very good! The few cocktails and some small plates (garlic green beans, spring rolls, pot stickers) we had were also delicious. I feel like this is a hidden gem!
reviews.textTranslated: Benar-benar menikmati kunjungan pertama kami di Hutong! Menikmati dua menu spesialnya - bakpao babi dan mi dan dan domba. Pelayannya dengan ramah memperingatkan saya bahwa dan dannya akan sangat pedas, padahal saya suka makanan pedas, jadi saya menghargai peringatan itu dan bisa membuktikannya... rasanya sangat pedas dan sangat enak! Beberapa koktail dan beberapa hidangan kecil (buncis bawang putih, lumpia, dan potsticker) yang kami pesan juga lezat. Saya merasa ini seperti permata tersembunyi!

reviews.author: KGordon
reviews.text: We can’t say enough about this spot! Gracious service, relaxed vibe, and very well prepared food. The menu’s not so extensive that you get lost. There are plenty of options for more and less adventurous palates. Small plates are the way to go IMO—the portions aren’t skimpy and you can try different things.
reviews.textTranslated: Kami tak bisa berkata cukup tentang tempat ini! Pelayanannya ramah, suasananya santai, dan makanannya disiapkan dengan sangat baik. Menunya tidak terlalu banyak sampai-sampai Anda bingung. Ada banyak pilihan untuk selera yang lebih berani dan kurang berani. Menurut saya, piring kecil adalah pilihan yang tepat—porsinya tidak sedikit dan Anda bisa mencoba berbagai hal.

reviews.author: Nikelle Garner
reviews.text: The food was amazing! We had the pork buns (a special), the cucumber salad, the green beans, sweet beef bowl and the pear tea. All were spot on with sauce and flavor, we could have ordered more green beans. Atmosphere was relaxing and our waitress was helpful and kind.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya luar biasa! Kami memesan bakpao babi (menu spesial), salad mentimun, buncis, sup daging sapi manis, dan teh pir. Semuanya pas sekali dengan saus dan rasanya, kami bahkan ingin memesan lebih banyak buncis. Suasananya santai dan pelayan kami ramah dan membantu.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Nikelle,
Thank you for the kind words! We’re glad you enjoyed everything here at Hutong.

reviews.author: Karen Luo
reviews.text: I got the pork fried rice, and it was delicious. It might be the best thing I've eaten here in Madison since I arrived last fall. The restaurant itself is beautiful too, both in the decorations and atmosphere. Do be aware that their menu isn't exactly what it is online, since it's based on ingredient availability, but if all their food is this good, I don't think it'll be a problem.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya memesan nasi goreng babi, dan rasanya enak sekali. Mungkin ini makanan terbaik yang pernah saya makan di Madison sejak saya tiba musim gugur lalu. Restorannya sendiri juga indah, baik dari segi dekorasi maupun suasana. Perlu diingat bahwa menu mereka tidak persis sama dengan yang ada di online, karena bergantung pada ketersediaan bahan, tetapi jika semua makanan mereka seenak ini, saya rasa itu tidak akan menjadi masalah.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Karen, thank you for the good review. We are glad you like our pork rice. We’re trying to cook with the best ingredients to their best flavor, so our menu is small and some of the items will change time by time. We appreciate your understanding. Thanks for pointing out that our online menu is not up to date, we’ll improve it.

reviews.author: Reid Zibell
reviews.text: Small plate restaurant,  food is very delicious and sake!! A must try. Make reservations!!
reviews.textTranslated: Restoran dengan porsi kecil, makanannya sangat lezat dan sake-nya juga enak!! Wajib coba. Lakukan reservasi terlebih dahulu!!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Reid, thank you for your good review!!

reviews.author: Jack Guard
reviews.text: 胡同 HuTong is absolute heaven.  For a guy who studied and worked in Beijing for several years it was a treat beyond words to come here with a friend for dinner.  The owners and staff are friendly and warm as if we were invited into their home for dinner.  I will come here every opportunity I have.
reviews.textTranslated: Hu Tong adalah surga dunia. Bagi seorang pria yang belajar dan bekerja di Beijing selama beberapa tahun, datang ke sini bersama seorang teman untuk makan malam adalah pengalaman yang tak terkatakan. Pemilik dan stafnya ramah dan hangat, seolah-olah kami diundang ke rumah mereka untuk makan malam. Saya akan datang ke sini setiap ada kesempatan.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Jack, 
Thank you so much for the good reviews! I was so happy to meet you and your friend. We named the restaurant 胡同 is because we’d love to share some culture behind it, from our food, decorations, our people and more. We appreciate your understanding! 谢谢你懂我们！😆

reviews.author: Dr Rick Sjoquist
reviews.text: Finally found a Chinese restaurant in Dane County that serves authentic dishes. Went with a friend who is a part-time chef of Chinese specialties hired by various bistros and who, like me, lived in China for many years. We were met by a friendly local woman who had studied Chinese in China and was warmly attentive. The decor is simple but genuine with a traditional Chinese bar. Very cozy place. The lady who is the co-owner came out to check on us, too. Their hand-pulled Sichuan dan dan noodles were delicious and better than any I've had elsewhere in the U.S. So, too, were the fried dumpling and cucumber appetizers. The dumplings were good but quite small. They offer a Uighur style lamb stew special which another customer said was delicious. This place deserves a devoted clientele. My friend and I vowed to return often to try other items on their adequate menu (it would be great if they served Beijing style boiled dumplings and more noodle dishes).
reviews.textTranslated: Akhirnya saya menemukan restoran Cina di Dane County yang menyajikan hidangan otentik. Saya pergi bersama seorang teman yang bekerja paruh waktu sebagai koki spesialis masakan Cina yang dipekerjakan oleh berbagai bistro dan yang, seperti saya, tinggal di Cina selama bertahun-tahun. Kami disambut oleh seorang wanita lokal yang ramah yang telah belajar bahasa Cina di Cina dan sangat perhatian. Dekorasinya sederhana namun autentik dengan bar Cina tradisional. Tempat yang sangat nyaman. Wanita yang merupakan salah satu pemiliknya juga keluar untuk memeriksa kami. Mie dan dan Sichuan buatan tangan mereka sangat lezat dan lebih enak daripada yang pernah saya makan di tempat lain di AS. Begitu juga dengan pangsit goreng dan mentimun sebagai hidangan pembuka. Pangsitnya enak tapi agak kecil. Mereka menawarkan hidangan spesial berupa semur domba ala Uighur yang menurut pelanggan lain sangat lezat. Tempat ini pantas mendapatkan pelanggan setia. Saya dan teman saya berjanji untuk sering kembali untuk mencoba hidangan lain di menu mereka yang memadai (akan lebih bagus jika mereka menyajikan pangsit rebus ala Beijing dan lebih banyak hidangan mie).
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you, Dr Rick Sjoquist. 
It’s our pleasure to meet you and your friend. Meet and chat with people who understand the meaning of “Hutong” and sharing some experiences about China are the great bonus to us. We are here to offer best authentic Chinese food and cozy places for everyone to enjoy. 
Hope to see you again on Friday or Saturday. We will have lamb skewers here. 😄

reviews.author: Blaize Norton-Wisla
reviews.text: Potstickers
reviews.textTranslated: Potsticker
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Blaise, thank you for your 5-star review. We love our potstickers, too!

reviews.author: Patrick Deming
reviews.text:
A group of us had dinner at Hutong last Sunday evening. I made reservations on-line. It's not a form, but instead it emails them, and they email you back.  Easy enough and I made reservations for the outside patio which I didn't even realize existed from walking past the front. When our group arrived, we were promptly greeted and ushered to the patio area. (There are steps if that matters to you.) It's a really nice patio area.  It felt nicely secluded with lovely decorations. They were short-staffed that evening, so our waitress was also the bartender, but she did a wonderful job of taking care of us.
My partner and I had the Scallion Pancakes which were light, not greasy, and had a delicious scallion flavor. We also ate the Crispy Squid with house-made pepper salt.  I loved the squid which included several tentacle pieces. It came with a slightly spicy, salty sauce which paired marvelously. For entrees I had the DanDan noodles which our waitress warned us were spicy and they were, but I utterly loved them. My partner had the Braised Pork Rice and highly recommended it.
I had not been to Hutong before, but we'll definitely go back.
reviews.textTranslated:
Sekelompok dari kami makan malam di Hutong Minggu malam lalu. Saya memesan tempat secara online. Bukan melalui formulir, tetapi melalui email, dan mereka akan membalas email Anda. Cukup mudah dan saya memesan tempat di teras luar yang bahkan tidak saya sadari keberadaannya saat melewati bagian depan. Ketika kelompok kami tiba, kami segera disambut dan diantar ke area teras. (Ada tangga jika itu penting bagi Anda.) Area terasnya sangat bagus. Terasa nyaman dan terpencil dengan dekorasi yang indah. Mereka kekurangan staf malam itu, jadi pelayan kami juga merangkap sebagai bartender, tetapi dia melakukan pekerjaan yang luar biasa dalam melayani kami.
Saya dan pasangan saya memesan Scallion Pancakes yang ringan, tidak berminyak, dan memiliki rasa daun bawang yang lezat. Kami juga makan Crispy Squid dengan garam lada buatan sendiri. Saya menyukai cumi-cumi yang berisi beberapa potongan tentakel. Disajikan dengan saus yang sedikit pedas dan asin yang sangat cocok. Untuk hidangan pembuka, saya memesan mi DanDan yang sudah diperingatkan oleh pelayan bahwa rasanya pedas, dan memang benar, tapi saya sangat menyukainya. Pasangan saya memesan Nasi Babi Rebus dan sangat merekomendasikannya.
Saya belum pernah ke Hutong sebelumnya, tapi kami pasti akan kembali.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Patrick, thank you for the good review. We appreciate that you shared the experience about our “new”reservation system with others. Thank you for the beautiful words about our service and food. We will see you again!

reviews.author: Thao Nguyen
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Thao, thank you for the 5 starts review!
We’re sorry for the inconvenience parking with the construction working on Wilson St. The construction should be completed before December. After that, there will be more available street parking in our area. ❤️

reviews.author: Lisa Goodman
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Lisa, thank you for the good review!

reviews.author: Riniky
reviews.text: This is our first time eating out in Hutong. We ordered Dan Dan Noodles and Garlic green beans. Great food with great flavors and amazing taste! The Dan Dan Noodles are spicy. If I could rate the spice level 10 being max I would give them 7.5-8ish. I love spicy food so no complaints! Definitely cleared my sinuses. The green beans were nice & crunchy. Great appetizer or a small plate. Potion size was good. The menu is not overwhelmingly long like other Chinese restaurants so that's nice especially when it's difficult to decide what to order. I would definitely go back again to dine in there. It's nice to have a good & authentic Chinese restaurant in Madison without the need to travel to Chicago to satisfy your taste buds.
reviews.textTranslated: Ini pertama kalinya kami makan di luar di Hutong. Kami memesan Mie Dan Dan dan buncis bawang putih. Makanannya lezat dengan rasa yang luar biasa! Mie Dan Dan-nya pedas. Kalau boleh memberi nilai 10 untuk tingkat kepedasan maksimal, saya beri nilai 7,5-8. Saya suka makanan pedas, jadi tidak ada keluhan! Benar-benar melegakan sinus saya. Buncisnya renyah dan enak. Cocok untuk hidangan pembuka atau hidangan kecil. Porsinya pas. Menunya tidak terlalu panjang seperti restoran Cina lainnya, jadi itu bagus, terutama saat sulit memutuskan apa yang akan dipesan. Saya pasti akan kembali lagi untuk makan di sana. Senang rasanya ada restoran Cina yang enak dan autentik di Madison tanpa perlu pergi ke Chicago untuk memuaskan selera.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Polakshee, for your kind words! It’s our pleasure that you enjoyed our foods. We are looking forward to seeing you, again. ❤️

reviews.author: Hung Thai
reviews.text: "Hutong" means an alleyway. This restaurant really isn't in an alleyway but the idea is to signify a small restaurant that you'd by happenstance. The outside is very nondescript but it is popping inside. Full tables with conversations in the air. The menu is small which is great. I find the giant Chinese menus to cause me paralysis by analysis. If you like spicy, get the DAN DAN noodles. The spicy beef noodle soup is also very good, and so is the garlic green beans. A glass of jasmine tea rounds out the meal. $60 with tips.
reviews.textTranslated: "Hutong" artinya gang. Restoran ini sebenarnya tidak berada di gang, tetapi idenya adalah untuk menandakan restoran kecil yang mungkin Anda temukan secara tidak sengaja. Bagian luarnya sangat sederhana, tetapi di dalamnya ramai. Meja-meja penuh dengan percakapan yang ramai. Menunya kecil, yang bagus. Saya merasa menu Cina yang besar membuat saya bingung karena terlalu banyak berpikir. Jika Anda suka pedas, pesan mi DAN DAN. Sup mi daging sapi pedas juga sangat enak, begitu pula buncis bawang putihnya. Segelas teh melati melengkapi hidangan. $60 termasuk tip.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Hung, thank you for your 5 stars review. We truly appreciate your explanation and understanding the meaning of “Hutong”. Thanks for enjoying our foods and our dining space!

reviews.author: Wen Lee
reviews.text:
尚可 算好吃

豬肘飯：4.5⭐️
珍珠奶茶：5⭐️
reviews.textTranslated:
Lumayan, cukup lezat

Nasi kaki babi: 4,5 bintang
Teh bubble: 5 bintang
reviews.responseFromOwner: 感谢发评po图

reviews.author: Brock Bakke
reviews.text: Very high quality dining experience overall.
reviews.textTranslated: Pengalaman bersantap yang sangat berkualitas secara keseluruhan.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Brock, thank you for the good review. It’s our pleasure that you had a great experience at Hutong.

reviews.author: Tamara McKinney
reviews.text: Absolutely delicious food with great service. The green beans and cold sesame noodles were amazing, but the true star of the meal was a chicken salad with garlic and oyster sauce served cold on sliced cucumbers. I would have licked the plate.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya benar-benar lezat dengan pelayanan yang luar biasa. Buncis dan mi wijen dinginnya sangat enak, tetapi bintang utama hidangan ini adalah salad ayam dengan bawang putih dan saus tiram yang disajikan dingin di atas irisan mentimun. Saya pasti akan menjilat piringnya sampai bersih.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Tamara, thank you so much for the good review! It’s our pleasure that you enjoyed our food and service.

reviews.author: scuzz
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi scuzz, thanks for your 5 star review!

reviews.author: Tony Thornton
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Tony, thank you for your 5 star review!

reviews.author: Eric Li
reviews.text:
Great restaurant with calming environment and good views to the Monona lake! The food is excellent, especially the lamb skewers, and all the staffs are very friendly! :)
Pic is mochi for dessert-the cream was creamy and mochi was soft and sweet.
reviews.textTranslated:
Restoran yang bagus dengan suasana yang menenangkan dan pemandangan indah ke Danau Monona! Makanannya sangat enak, terutama sate domba, dan semua stafnya sangat ramah! :)
Foto ini adalah mochi untuk hidangan penutup - krimnya lembut dan mochinya halus dan manis.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Eric, 
Thank you for the good review and support in the past years. We glad to meet you at Hutong. We wish you all the best wherever you go! Come back to visit often. Go badgers! 前程必似锦。

reviews.author: Emily Cunningham
reviews.text:
I’ve lived and dined in Madison for 30 years and can say this is by the far my favorite spot. I contemplated not writing a review to keep it a secret, but the family who owns it deserve the attention and you all deserve to enjoy some of the most amazing food in the town.. state… country?

The Dan Dan Noodles are Amazing. Actually spicy and so nuanced. This town is full of knock off versions of this famous dish. This is the real deal.

The spicy beef noodle soup has one of the richest broths combined with fresh veggies and quality beef.

For apps, check the daily specials. Then, you can’t go wrong with the pot stickers, calamari (which is real fresh squid and lightly perfectly breaded), the garlic green beans, and garlic cucumber dish.

Beyond the food, the service is absolutely best in town. Erin, who seems to run the place, is both hilarious, attentive, approachable, and incredibly knowledgeable. She’s a highlight of our dinners as much as the food.

Last point- prices are actually affordable and more than worth the quality.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya sudah tinggal dan makan di Madison selama 30 tahun dan dapat mengatakan bahwa ini adalah tempat favorit saya. Saya sempat berpikir untuk tidak menulis ulasan agar tetap menjadi rahasia, tetapi keluarga pemiliknya pantas mendapatkan perhatian dan Anda semua pantas menikmati beberapa makanan paling menakjubkan di kota... negara bagian... negara?

Mie Dan Dan-nya luar biasa. Benar-benar pedas dan sangat kaya rasa. Kota ini penuh dengan versi tiruan dari hidangan terkenal ini. Ini adalah yang asli.

Sup mie daging sapi pedasnya memiliki salah satu kaldu terkaya yang dipadukan dengan sayuran segar dan daging sapi berkualitas.

Untuk makanan pembuka, lihat menu spesial harian. Kemudian, Anda tidak akan salah memilih pangsit, cumi goreng (yang merupakan cumi segar asli dan dilapisi tepung roti dengan sempurna), buncis bawang putih, dan hidangan mentimun bawang putih.

Selain makanan, pelayanannya benar-benar terbaik di kota ini. Erin, yang tampaknya mengelola tempat ini, sangat lucu, perhatian, mudah didekati, dan sangat berpengetahuan. Dia adalah bagian terbaik dari makan malam kami, sama seperti makanannya.


Poin terakhir - harganya terjangkau dan lebih dari sepadan dengan kualitasnya.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you, thank you so much, Emily! 
We’re blessed to have Erin here with us, and so pleasure to have you and Luke love our foods and enjoy hangout at the bar here. Big big Love!

reviews.author: Jennifer Perez
reviews.text: Authentic Chinese restaurant. Serves as its ready (dim sum style I believe the waitresses said). They were out of the pork fried rice, which was disappointing not to be able to try but everything else was pretty good. There was a beef broth that I had which was yummy and very healthy. My friend had the garlic green beans and she said they were best she ever had. I thought yummy too and I’m not a big green bean fan. I’d love to go back and try the rice next 👍
reviews.textTranslated: Restoran Cina otentik. Disajikan sesuai pesanan (gaya dim sum, setidaknya begitu kata pelayan). Nasi goreng babi mereka habis, yang agak mengecewakan karena tidak bisa dicoba, tetapi yang lainnya cukup enak. Saya memesan sup kaldu sapi yang lezat dan sangat sehat. Teman saya memesan buncis bawang putih dan dia bilang itu yang terbaik yang pernah dia makan. Saya juga berpikir itu enak, padahal saya bukan penggemar buncis. Saya ingin kembali dan mencoba nasi gorengnya lain kali 👍
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Jennifer, thank you for your 5 star review and great photos! It’s our pleasure to serve you and your friend. We’re glad that both of you enjoyed some of our foods here. Looking forward to seeing you again and have the pork rice ready for you!

reviews.author: Melanie Sartori Schmidt
reviews.text: Food was amazing and well presented, and the server we had was so friendly, helpful and welcoming. I especially liked the Dan Dan Noodles and the scallion pancakes, and their iced tea is just wow. Also, the interior is beautiful and peaceful.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya luar biasa dan tersaji dengan baik, dan pelayan yang melayani kami sangat ramah, membantu, dan ramah. Saya sangat menyukai Dan Dan Noodles dan panekuk daun bawang, dan es teh mereka sungguh luar biasa. Selain itu, interiornya indah dan tenang.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Melanie, thank you for your good review! We’re glad that you enjoyed our foods, drinks, services and the vibe of Hutong!

reviews.author: Nicole Nietlisbach
reviews.text: One of my favorite restaurants in Madison! The beef noodle soup and dan dan noodles are both incredible. Most recently got the Concerts on the Square special take out meal (sesame noodles) which was so good!
reviews.textTranslated: Salah satu restoran favorit saya di Madison! Sup mi sapi dan mi dan dannya luar biasa. Baru-baru ini saya memesan menu spesial Concerts on the Square untuk dibawa pulang (mi wijen) yang sangat lezat!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Nicole, thank you for loving our foods! We’re so happy that you enjoyed our COTS take out meal!!

reviews.author: M K
reviews.text: Good food & a friendly staff. Will be back to try more.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya enak dan stafnya ramah. Pasti akan kembali lagi untuk mencoba lagi.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, M K! We’re looking forward to seeing you again.

reviews.author: Dan Gordon
reviews.text: Very good food and interesting too.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya sangat enak dan juga menarik.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Dan, thank you for your good review! We will keep creating more good and interesting foods.

reviews.author: Benjamin Zank
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Benjamin, thank you for your 5 stars review!

reviews.author: Ronald Garcia
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Ronald, thank you for your 5 stars review!

reviews.author: EJW
reviews.text: Near the capital, this cozy spot is as close to perfect as you can find in Madison. The DanDan noodles are spicy and flavorful. Lamb kabobs are an excellent appetizer. Wonderful and warm service.
reviews.textTranslated: Dekat ibu kota, tempat nyaman ini bisa dibilang yang paling sempurna di Madison. Mi DanDan-nya pedas dan lezat. Kebab domba adalah hidangan pembuka yang luar biasa. Pelayanannya luar biasa dan ramah.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Edward, thank you for the kind words!

reviews.author: Anmol Eswarapu
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Anmol, thank you for the 5 stars!

reviews.author: Musab Güneş
reviews.text: We ordered beef noodle and dandan noodles. Amazing taste! The atmosphere was also very clean and positive. The stuff is friendly and quick. Recommend to everyone!!
reviews.textTranslated: Kami memesan mie daging sapi dan mie dandan. Rasanya luar biasa! Suasananya juga sangat bersih dan menyenangkan. Stafnya ramah dan cepat. Rekomendasi untuk semua orang!!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Musab, thank you for the 5 stars review!! It’s our pleasure to serve.

reviews.author: Monyka L
reviews.text: Very pleasant service and delicious Chinese cuisine! Broth in the beef noodle soup was flavorful. The Fuzhu salad may look simple, but it was packed with flavor! Their Bingfen (ice jelly) is cooling and delicious too. Definitely will be coming here again! Note: they no longer sell lamb skewers.
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanannya sangat ramah dan masakan Cina-nya lezat! Kuah kaldu dalam sup mi sapinya terasa lezat. Salad Fuzhu-nya mungkin terlihat sederhana, tetapi rasanya sungguh lezat! Bingfen (es jeli) mereka juga menyegarkan dan lezat. Pasti akan kembali ke sini lagi! Catatan: mereka tidak lagi menjual sate domba.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Monyka, thank you for your good review and kind words! 
We are currently offering the lamb skewers as weekend specials. Yes, it’s no longer on our regular menus, but we’re trying to offering them on Friday and Saturday. If you’re interested in the skewers. Welcome back on the weekend! It’s a first-come-first-serve item, and it’s limited 2 per person. We apologize that that we have to limited some of our menu items, so we could offer more variety Chinese foods for more people to enjoy! 理解万岁❤️

reviews.author: Curt C. Smith
reviews.text: One of the best places in Madison!
reviews.textTranslated: Salah satu tempat terbaik di Madison!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Curt, thank you for the good review!

reviews.author: Zach Hanes
reviews.text: The food is excellent. Very warm and welcoming atmosphere. This is my favorite restaurant in Madison now. I can’t recommend enough.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya luar biasa. Suasananya sangat hangat dan ramah. Ini adalah restoran favorit saya di Madison sekarang. Saya sangat merekomendasikannya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Zach, Thank you for your kind words!

reviews.author: Nora Cullen
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Nora, thank you for the 5 stars.

reviews.author: Teri Peterson
reviews.text:
Found this delightful Asian restaurant quite by happenstance. Quaint, nicely decorated, and a friendly, informative staff.
A limited menu but not complaining. Everything was beautifully seasoned and flavorful. Definitely recommend.
reviews.textTranslated:
Menemukan restoran Asia yang menyenangkan ini secara tidak sengaja. Unik, didekorasi dengan indah, dan stafnya ramah dan informatif.
Menunya terbatas tetapi tidak mengecewakan. Semuanya dibumbui dengan sangat baik dan beraroma. Sangat direkomendasikan.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Teri, thank you for your good review!

reviews.author: Sophia Winkler-Schor (Sophia Winkler)
reviews.text: I was excited about a new Chinese restaurant in town! Madison is seriously lacking good Asian food from across the continent. Unfortunately, the food wasn’t what I was hoping for but most of it is my personal preference. The menu is small which is usually a good thing. Overall, I found the menu lacked vegetarian and GF options and what I tried was bland. I loved the green beans and wish that had been an option for a main. The Dan dan noodle was fine. I think more bok choy or vegetable again would have been better. I thought the scallion pancake was dry and thin. I have eaten scallion pancakes at a lot of places and these had very little scallion and no sauce. The spring rolls lacked flavor and texture in my opinion. The restaurant has no vegetarian mains and is quite meat heavy overall which once again is fine if that isn’t their style but limiting for people. There are very limited gluten free items as well which was a shame for my mom but she enjoyed her braised pork rice bowl. While the tipping policy did not affect me, I did find it unprofessional to have three potential tipping scenarios “that may affect you” but did not make a definitive guideline which makes it seem quite subjective. I understand requiring tips for large  parties but it should be clearly defined when those gratuity charges are added so they aren’t a surprise.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sangat senang dengan restoran Cina baru di kota ini! Madison benar-benar kekurangan makanan Asia yang enak dari seluruh benua. Sayangnya, makanannya tidak sesuai harapan saya, tetapi sebagian besar memang selera pribadi saya. Menunya sedikit, yang biasanya merupakan hal yang baik. Secara keseluruhan, saya merasa menunya kurang pilihan vegetarian dan bebas gluten, dan yang saya coba hambar. Saya suka buncisnya dan berharap itu bisa menjadi pilihan utama. Mie Dan Dan-nya lumayan. Saya rasa akan lebih baik jika ditambahkan bok choy atau sayuran lagi. Saya pikir panekuk daun bawangnya kering dan tipis. Saya sudah makan panekuk daun bawang di banyak tempat, dan panekuknya hanya menggunakan sedikit daun bawang dan tanpa saus. Lumpianya menurut saya kurang rasa dan tekstur. Restoran ini tidak menyediakan menu utama vegetarian dan secara keseluruhan cukup banyak daging, yang sekali lagi tidak masalah jika itu bukan gaya mereka, tetapi membatasi untuk orang-orang. Menu bebas gluten juga sangat terbatas, yang sangat disayangkan ibu saya, tetapi dia menikmati semangkuk nasi babi rebusnya. Meskipun kebijakan pemberian tip tidak memengaruhi saya, saya merasa tidak profesional karena memiliki tiga skenario potensial pemberian tip "yang mungkin memengaruhi Anda", tetapi tidak membuat pedoman yang pasti sehingga terkesan subjektif. Saya mengerti adanya kewajiban memberi tip untuk rombongan besar, tetapi seharusnya dijelaskan dengan jelas kapan biaya tip tersebut ditambahkan agar tidak mengejutkan.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for sharing your thoughts about Hutong, Sophia! We’re glad your mom enjoyed our pork rice.

reviews.author: Rahul Kamath
reviews.text: I love this place. The food is excellent and represents a region of China that you rarely see restaurants specializing in. My friend and I ordered green beans, chili popcorn chicken, salt and pepper squid, and dan dan noodles. They nailed every dish. Very tasty and reasonably priced! Also the patio out back is so charming and cute.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya suka tempat ini. Makanannya luar biasa dan mewakili daerah di Tiongkok yang jarang Anda temukan restoran yang mengkhususkan diri di sana. Saya dan teman saya memesan buncis, ayam popcorn cabai, cumi garam dan lada, dan mi dan dan. Mereka berhasil menyajikan setiap hidangan dengan sempurna. Sangat enak dan harganya terjangkau! Selain itu, teras di belakangnya sangat menawan dan lucu.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Rahul, it’s our pleasure that you enjoyed our food. Our patio is open now. Hope to see you soon!

reviews.author: Uma Chatterjee
reviews.text: One of the absolute best restaurants in Madison, such a gem. Everything on the menu is spectacular, you can’t go wrong! The Dan Dan noodles are EXQUISITE.
reviews.textTranslated: Salah satu restoran terbaik di Madison, sungguh permata tersembunyi. Semua yang ada di menu sangat spektakuler, Anda tidak akan salah pilih! Mie Dan Dan-nya SANGAT LEZAT.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Uma, thank you for loving our Dan Dan noodles!

reviews.author: Justin Leatherwood
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Justin!

reviews.author: xiaoqing lin
reviews.text: 我只能说老板的审美太棒了。 装饰和装修非常协调且有韵味。佩服佩服。
reviews.textTranslated: Saya hanya bisa bilang pemiliknya punya estetika yang fantastis. Dekorasi dan perabotannya sangat harmonis dan penuh pesona. Saya sangat mengagumi Anda.
reviews.responseFromOwner: 谢谢谢谢！您认可我们的审美，比认可我们的食物还让我开心😂

reviews.author: G Aliu
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, G!

reviews.author: Michael
reviews.text:
Really nice addition to Madison’s Asian food scene! The Dan Dan noodles are unlike anything you can get in Madison; it’s spicy but well balanced!

Everything we tried on the menu was delicious and the service was friendly and professional! They do seem a bit short staffed though, as they are open for limited hours.
reviews.textTranslated:
Tambahan yang sangat menarik untuk kuliner Asia di Madison! Mi Dan Dan-nya berbeda dari yang bisa Anda temukan di Madison; pedasnya pas, tapi seimbang!

Semua yang kami coba di menu lezat dan pelayanannya ramah dan profesional! Sayangnya, mereka agak kekurangan staf karena jam bukanya terbatas.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Michael, thank you for your good review!

reviews.author: Julie Wong
reviews.text: I had a great experience here in Hutong. The Chinese decorations are delicate. The cocktails are great. The service was fantastic.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya punya pengalaman yang luar biasa di Hutong. Dekorasi khas Tiongkoknya sangat elegan. Koktailnya luar biasa. Pelayanannya fantastis.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Yinghua, thank you for your kind words! Fantastic service, great cocktails, delicate Chinese decorations and great experience = Hutong wants people to feel here. Thanks!

reviews.author: Zhengxu Ma
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Zhengxu!

reviews.author: Yi G
reviews.text:
******Decided to write an update to my initial comments after google map notified me that people are reacting to my review all of sudden. ******

I was fairly surprised to see the extensiveness of the defensive reply from the owner. I feel bullied somehow. But I still hold firm that the tomato beef noodle soup, the only item I tried, did not meet my expectation for $20 price tag, and my comments were consistent with others who commented on this particular menu item.

1. Yes, I "only spent 29.54 + tips" as the owner said. It feels to me that in the owner's mind, I am not eligible to comment since I didn't spend hundreds. To be fair to the owner, I didn't try other items. But I was just comment on my experience about the particular item I did try. I do not see any problem with it, or it has anything to do with how much I spend.

2. Yes, I am ethic Chinese. But to any business, I am FIRST a paying customer, my ethnic or country of origin shouldn't be mentioned or exploited to influence rating.

3. The owner left my name in multiple comments, I assume it was obtained from the credit card receipt alongside with the $amount I spent. The name-calling fashion of responding to customer's negative experience is a serious violation of privacy. Federal law protects consumers’ private information from being disclosed on credit and debit card receipts under the Fair and Accurate Credit Transactions Act (FACTA). Pursuant to FACTA, merchants are not permitted to disclose any part of info of the transaction. As a business owner, please be aware your action was unlawful.

You have a great restaurant with good ratings and customer base in a mid-west college town. It is beyond comprehensible to me regarding how defensive/combative you are towards feedback, and actively trashing negative comments. Your way of reacting leaves potential customers a bad perception.

Not that it will matter but reducing my rating to 1 star from 2, based on how the owner's interaction with customer
******************************************************************
The $20 tomato beef soup noodle is quite a disappointment. Too bad I didn’t take a photo of it, but I think google maps housed enough photo of this particular item already.

Here are my thoughts - the soup base was generic, the tomato chunks were added as a afterthought (probably shared the soup base with beef noodle soup). The tomato was likely canned tomato, without much flavor or texture.

Four slices of beef, that’s it. If you ever order that in Boston or Chicago or any major city’s Chinese restaurants, you’ll get many big chunks of stewed beef. Especially at 20-buck range.

The Bok Choy- the veggie should be there to serve as a contrast of color- green vs. red tomato soup base. You won’t see any leaf, just chopped up bottoms of bok choy stem. Where is the leaf? If you don’t know what I mean, simply search “tomato beef noodle soup” in google image and pick any one to compare with theirs.

I have to say the service is good, the ambience and decor was great. The chef should be replaced, and some serious thoughts of dish presentation should be given. Especially charging at high end pricing.

Therefore, my 2-star rating - mismatched food quality and price tag.
reviews.textTranslated:
******Memutuskan untuk menulis pembaruan pada komentar awal saya setelah Google Maps memberi tahu saya bahwa orang-orang tiba-tiba bereaksi terhadap ulasan saya. ******

Saya cukup terkejut melihat banyaknya balasan defensif dari pemilik. Entah bagaimana saya merasa diintimidasi. Namun, saya tetap yakin bahwa sup mi daging sapi tomat, satu-satunya makanan yang saya coba, tidak memenuhi harapan saya dengan harga $20, dan komentar saya konsisten dengan orang lain yang mengomentari makanan khusus ini.

1. Ya, saya "hanya menghabiskan 29,54 + tip" seperti yang dikatakan pemilik. Menurut saya, dalam benak pemilik, saya tidak berhak berkomentar karena saya tidak menghabiskan ratusan. Agar adil kepada pemilik, saya tidak mencoba makanan lain. Namun, saya hanya mengomentari pengalaman saya tentang makanan tertentu yang saya coba. Saya tidak melihat ada masalah dengan itu, atau ada hubungannya dengan berapa banyak yang saya belanjakan.

2. Ya, saya orang Tionghoa beretika. Namun, bagi bisnis apa pun, SAYA adalah pelanggan yang membayar, etnis atau negara asal saya tidak boleh disebutkan atau dimanfaatkan untuk memengaruhi peringkat.

3. Pemilik mencantumkan nama saya di beberapa komentar, saya berasumsi nama itu diperoleh dari tanda terima kartu kredit bersama dengan jumlah $ yang saya belanjakan. Cara mencaci-maki dalam menanggapi pengalaman negatif pelanggan merupakan pelanggaran privasi yang serius. Undang-undang federal melindungi informasi pribadi konsumen agar tidak diungkapkan pada tanda terima kartu kredit dan debit berdasarkan Undang-Undang Transaksi Kredit yang Adil dan Akurat (FACTA). Berdasarkan FACTA, pedagang tidak diizinkan untuk mengungkapkan bagian mana pun dari info transaksi. Sebagai pemilik bisnis, harap ketahui bahwa tindakan Anda melanggar hukum.

Anda memiliki restoran hebat dengan peringkat dan basis pelanggan yang baik di kota perguruan tinggi di wilayah barat tengah. Saya tidak dapat memahami betapa defensif/agresifnya Anda terhadap umpan balik, dan secara aktif mencela komentar negatif. Cara Anda bereaksi meninggalkan persepsi yang buruk terhadap calon pelanggan.

Bukan berarti itu penting, tetapi mengurangi penilaian saya dari 2 menjadi 1 bintang, berdasarkan interaksi pemilik dengan pelanggan
*********************************************************************
Mie sup daging sapi tomat seharga $20 cukup mengecewakan. Sayang sekali saya tidak mengambil fotonya, tetapi menurut saya Google Maps sudah menyediakan cukup banyak foto untuk item ini.

Berikut pendapat saya - dasar supnya biasa saja, potongan tomat ditambahkan sebagai renungan (mungkin berbagi dasar sup dengan sup mie sapi). Tomatnya kemungkinan tomat kalengan, tanpa banyak rasa atau tekstur.

Empat potong daging sapi, itu saja. Jika Anda pernah memesannya di Boston atau Chicago atau restoran Cina di kota besar mana pun, Anda akan mendapatkan banyak potongan besar daging sapi rebus. Terutama pada kisaran harga 20 dolar.

Bok Choy - sayurannya seharusnya ada di sana untuk menjadi kontras warna - dasar sup tomat hijau vs. merah. Anda tidak akan melihat daun, hanya bagian bawah batang sawi yang dipotong-potong. Di mana daunnya? Jika Anda tidak tahu apa yang saya maksud, cukup cari "sup mie daging sapi tomat" di gambar Google dan pilih salah satu untuk dibandingkan dengan milik mereka.

Saya harus mengatakan layanannya bagus, suasana dan dekorasinya hebat. Koki harus diganti, dan beberapa pemikiran serius harus diberikan pada penyajian hidangan. Terutama mengenakan harga yang mahal.

Oleh karena itu, peringkat bintang 2 saya - kualitas makanan dan harga yang tidak sesuai.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Gong Yi,
You don’t have to write the reviews with your partner to insult a small business like Hutong. I understand you didn’t like the flavor of our Tomato beef noodle soup, that was ok since taste is a very personal thing. BUT you didn't have to rate TWO 2 stars reviews with your partner- Tatiana B. Do you see that the Tomato Beef Noodle Soup is her recommended dishes about us. 
You and your partner Tatiana only ordered two items from our menu: Tomato beef noodle soup and Pot stickers. It was hasty to get a conclusion about our food. We have clear descriptions about our beef noodle soup. 

"-HUTONG Beef Noodle Soup    胡同招牌牛骨汤面    19 
Original house simmered 100% beef bone broth* with spices, beef shank, cilantro, scallion, daikon radish, bok choy, carrots   (mild) 
 -Tomato Beef Noodle Soup    番茄牛肉面   20 
House-made tomato paste cooked with the beef bone broth*, beef shank, cilantro, scallion, daikon radish, bok choy, and diced tomato  
* no artificial color, poultry, or pork added"

The price we made to our food because its cost of labor, time and high qualitied ingredients. We’re very proud of our beef bone noodle soup, because we’re one of the few restaurant cooking the broth with 100% beef meat, beef bones, and beef tendons rather than using any kinds of packaged flavors. The flavors of our beef broth is all from real ingredients (lots of vegetables and Chinese spices beside beef). We don’t use artificial flavors, color and any other meat to cook our beef broth. That is a 20+ hours simmered cooking. What you have the broth is 100% original, we never water down the broth. It’s very unluck you don’t like the one dish that you picked from our menu, so it’s worth nothing to you. You could be right with your two stars rate, that is your personal thought. However, you’re totally wrong about our food and how we are responsible and respect to cooking. Have you ever checked our Ins about how we cook our broth and other foods?
With trying only two items spent $29.54+tips for two people with your partner. You and Tatiana had to gave us Two 2 stars reviews. IT IS an INSULT to a small business. Please be more respect to Chinese as you own. 大家都是中国人，所以应该更能够理解中国美食的多样性。很不幸你不喜欢我们的食物，但是这不是你和你朋友恶意攻击我们的理由!

reviews.author: Yi L.
reviews.text: I don't like your way of dealing with customer complaints/conflicts. Different people have different tastes. Responding in an arrogant way and indicating those who gave you a low score do not understand Chinese food will never lead you to a success. As a customer, I can only see how self-indulgent you are. I was not involved in the conflict you had with some of your customers, but this is the first time that I see a restaurant quarrel with their customers on Google Maps.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya tidak menyukai cara Anda menangani keluhan/konflik pelanggan. Setiap orang memiliki selera yang berbeda. Menanggapi dengan arogan dan menunjukkan bahwa mereka yang memberi Anda nilai rendah tidak mengerti makanan Cina tidak akan pernah membawa Anda menuju kesuksesan. Sebagai pelanggan, saya hanya bisa melihat betapa egoisnya Anda. Saya tidak terlibat dalam konflik yang Anda alami dengan beberapa pelanggan Anda, tetapi ini adalah pertama kalinya saya melihat restoran bertengkar dengan pelanggannya di Google Maps.

reviews.author: Sam Frank
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Sam!

reviews.author: Courtney Alexander
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Courtney!

reviews.author: 777 Oreki
reviews.text:
I went to your restaurant yesterday alone.
One bowl of noodles, three kebabs and an appetizer.
Was charged a mandatory 18% service charge without being told.
It took you 50 minutes to serve the food.
How brazen is it to charge a mandatory 18% tip! And I was alone.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya pergi ke restoran Anda kemarin sendirian.

Satu mangkuk mi, tiga kebab, dan satu makanan pembuka.
Dikenakan biaya layanan wajib 18% tanpa diberitahu.
Anda membutuhkan waktu 50 menit untuk menyajikan makanan.
Betapa lancangnya Anda mengenakan biaya tip wajib 18%! Dan saya sendirian.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
To respond to this defamation from the UW-Madison students: JIN, LINXIANG & LIU, ZHE & your friend. Below is the words from our server-Erin (The best person in the whole galaxy! lol)

As your server it would be a more accurate review to give details about your visit as well as previous interaction.  The week before you argued with a different server about a policy of limiting a labor intensive item due to an ongoing kitchen staff shortage affecting all of madison.  
Your solution was to come in with friends but sit at 3 separate tables in an attempt to defraud the policy which was decided on to ease food shortages but still provide quality we're known for.  
You refused to speak to me and sat yourself then demanded immediate service.  Your rude behavior was noticed by the group of 8 to your right as well as another table and they apologized for your treatment many times.  
Please be honest and respectful of others dining experiences around you as well as the actual experience itself.

reviews.author: Dave Hannon
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Dave!

reviews.author: Shande Shaw
reviews.text: I’ll never spend my money there again. I tip well and I’m a good customer.  People in today’s age know different languages so you should be aware.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya tidak akan pernah menghabiskan uang saya di sana lagi. Saya memberi tip dengan baik dan saya adalah pelanggan yang baik. Orang-orang di zaman sekarang tahu berbagai bahasa, jadi Anda harus menyadarinya.

reviews.author: Barbara Robinson-Gallay
reviews.text: A friend recommended this and we decided to try it spur of the moment - and what an excellent decision. Everyone was so kind and nice. The cocktails were delicious- a bit strong but that’s a good thing! We started with pot stickers which were surprisingly crispy and full of flavor. I had the Dan Dan Noodles which I was told were were spicy - which they were! But in a good way. By the bottom of the bowl I was craving the spice. My husband got the Braised Pork rice which was amazing as well. I really appreciate the kindness and service here. I cannot wait to return!
reviews.textTranslated: Seorang teman merekomendasikan tempat ini dan kami memutuskan untuk mencobanya secara spontan - dan itu keputusan yang sangat tepat. Semua orang sangat ramah dan baik. Koktailnya enak - agak kuat tapi itu bagus! Kami mulai dengan pangsit goreng yang mengejutkan renyah dan penuh rasa. Saya memesan Mie Dan Dan yang katanya pedas - dan memang pedas! Tapi dalam arti yang baik. Saat mangkuk hampir habis, saya malah menginginkan rasa pedasnya. Suami saya memesan Nasi Babi Rebus yang juga luar biasa. Saya sangat menghargai keramahan dan pelayanan di sini. Saya tidak sabar untuk kembali!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Barbara, thank you for your good review and kind words!!

reviews.author: Алина
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the 5 stars!

reviews.author: S Tan
reviews.text: What a remarkable find in a Midwestern town. The food is really good and the standard is comparable to authentic places you can find in Vancouver or Seattle. The Dan Dan noodles are spicy! The service is great.
reviews.textTranslated: Sungguh penemuan yang luar biasa di kota Midwest ini. Makanannya benar-benar enak dan standarnya sebanding dengan tempat-tempat otentik yang bisa Anda temukan di Vancouver atau Seattle. Mie Dan Dan-nya pedas! Pelayanannya juga bagus.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi S, thank you for the good review!

reviews.author: Sanaya Kapadia
reviews.text: Loved the dan Dan noodles, they are quite spicy though. Also loved the spicy beef noodle soup. Lamb skewers were exceptional. Not stinky at all and very tender.
reviews.textTranslated: Suka mi Dan Dan-nya, meskipun agak pedas. Saya juga suka sup mi sapi pedasnya. Sate dombanya luar biasa. Tidak bau sama sekali dan sangat empuk.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Sanaya, thank you for loving our food!

reviews.author: Abraham Medina
reviews.text: Missing the Dan Dan noodles here! Had plenty of variations since and nothing comes close!
reviews.textTranslated: Aku kangen banget sama mie Dan Dan! Sudah coba banyak variasinya, tapi nggak ada yang bisa menandinginya!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Abraham, Thank you for the kinds words about our Dan Dan noodles!

reviews.author: Tatiana B
reviews.text: The service and the atmosphere were great but it’s not the place for an authentic experience. We were here at dinner time and they were out of almost all of menu items. That was very embarrassing. The kitchen must have made a certain number of dishes and ran out. So not Chinese style.
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanan dan suasananya bagus, tetapi tempat ini bukan untuk pengalaman otentik. Kami datang saat makan malam dan hampir semua menu sudah habis. Itu sangat memalukan. Dapur pasti sudah membuat sejumlah hidangan dan kehabisan. Jadi, bukan gaya masakan Cina yang sebenarnya.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Tatiana,
Your 2 starts review is worse than your partner Gong yi’s review. At least Gong Yi was talking about his opinions about food even though he was making his own imaginary mind. 

You wrote fictitious story. You and your partner came in the restaurant at 7:20pm on Saturday night. After our first rush hours, the only 2 items were sold out on our total 25 food items were Tofu skin salad and lamb skewers. Do you consider 2 out of 25 as “almost all of menu items”? LIE! What an authentic Chinese restaurant should be like? Never run out of foods? You must be misunderstanding authentic Chinese restaurants with fast-food or buffet? Our food is fresh made in house daily and numbers of our dishes are taking slow cooking process to present their best flavors. Of course, we’ll run out of dishes after first couple hours, if everyone orders the same items on a busy Saturday night.   

Please being respect to authentic Chinese foods and Chinese restaurants, we are not restaurant cooking packaged frozen produces. At Hutong, our popular authentic items run out fast, such as Lamb skewers, Pork rice, FuZhu, and even our beef noodle soups. You didn’t have to make-up stories to prove you were right about the 2 stars. Your words mislead others about what is an authentic Chinese restaurant. You want to play the game of “judging Asian restaurants to make me looks smart” with your partner Going Yi, don’t be a liar. You’ll only fool yourself.

reviews.author: holysoles
reviews.text: We were warned that the Dan Dan noodles would be spicy, and they were, but it was well worth it. Erin was a delight as our server and we had a great time. The patio has a great atmosphere too!
reviews.textTranslated: Kami sudah diperingatkan kalau mi Dan Dan-nya pedas, dan memang pedas, tapi itu sepadan. Erin sangat ramah sebagai pelayan kami, dan kami bersenang-senang. Terasnya juga punya suasana yang menyenangkan!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hello holysoles, thank you for the kind words! Our patio is opened for the season now. Welcome back!

reviews.author: Kenny Newman
reviews.text: I don't generally write reviews, but I will for Hutong because they blew me away and I want them to succeed so that I can keep dining there. The crispy squid tentacles were absolutely perfect and came with a delicious spicy sauce. The Dan Dan was also phenomenal if you like spicy (very spicy even though saying medium lol). Looking forward to trying more of their menu!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya biasanya tidak menulis ulasan, tapi saya akan menulis ulasan untuk Hutong karena mereka membuat saya terkesan dan saya berharap mereka sukses agar saya bisa terus makan di sana. Tentakel cumi renyahnya benar-benar sempurna dan disajikan dengan saus pedas yang lezat. Dan Dan-nya juga fenomenal kalau kamu suka pedas (sangat pedas meskipun bilangnya sedang, lol). Tak sabar untuk mencoba menu mereka lagi!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Kenny, thank you for writing this nice review!

reviews.author: Judy Zhu
reviews.text: Best soup noodle in Madison.
reviews.textTranslated: Mie kuah terbaik di Madison.

reviews.author: Brennan White
reviews.text: Simply in the top 5 best restaurants I’ve ever eaten at. Thank you for being in Madison!
reviews.textTranslated: Sederhananya, ini termasuk dalam 5 restoran terbaik yang pernah saya kunjungi. Terima kasih telah hadir di Madison!

reviews.author: Kevin Rak
reviews.text: The Dan Dan Noodles are in my top 10 dishes I've ever had!
reviews.textTranslated: Mie Dan Dan termasuk dalam 10 makanan favorit saya sepanjang masa!

reviews.author: Jay Marietta
reviews.text: A new favorite, everything on the menu is delicious
reviews.textTranslated: Menu favorit baru saya, semuanya enak sekali.

reviews.author: Derek Zimmerman
reviews.text: The food at Hutong is DELICIOUS! On top of that, we had amazing service, quick seating, and the little touches and attention to detail were so impressive. We cannot wait to go back!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan di Hutong ENAK BANGET! Selain itu, pelayanannya luar biasa, tempat duduknya cepat, dan sentuhan-sentuhan kecil serta perhatian terhadap detailnya sangat mengesankan. Kami tak sabar untuk kembali!

reviews.author: Alexander Schultz
reviews.text: This is one of the best meals I've ever had.
reviews.textTranslated: Ini adalah salah satu makanan terbaik yang pernah saya makan.

reviews.author: Dana Byers
reviews.text: Everything was delicious! We especially loved the fried seafood potstickers.  Very kind staff.
reviews.textTranslated: Semuanya enak sekali! Kami sangat menyukai pangsit goreng seafood-nya. Stafnya juga sangat ramah.

reviews.author: Doctress Julia X.
reviews.text: Amazing, authentic Chinese food in a quirky space. The patio, though! That is a lovely hideout. They should put way more plants back there! We ate patio side and had some soju, noodles and potstickers. Our bill was quite expensive so this is not a place I'd go regularly... but they have Chinese liquor I haven't seen anyplace else and the food was delicious so give it a try!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan Cina otentik yang luar biasa di tempat yang unik. Terasnya, sungguh! Itu tempat persembunyian yang indah. Mereka seharusnya menanam lebih banyak tanaman di sana! Kami makan di teras dan memesan soju, mi, dan pangsit. Tagihan kami cukup mahal jadi ini bukan tempat yang akan saya kunjungi secara teratur... tetapi mereka memiliki minuman keras Cina yang belum pernah saya lihat di tempat lain dan makanannya lezat, jadi cobalah!

reviews.author: Leland Pan
reviews.text: Great spot for northern Chinese food, which is pretty uncommon in the US. Highlights include the lamb skewers and any of the noodle dishes. Currently only open for dinner hours, they also have a diverse alcohol and cocktail selection and a very nice outdoor patio when it is warm. But the main draw is the authentic Chinese food from a region of China that you can't really get anywhere else in Wisconsin
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang tepat untuk menikmati hidangan Cina utara, yang cukup jarang ditemukan di AS. Menu andalannya antara lain sate domba dan berbagai hidangan mi. Saat ini hanya buka saat makan malam, mereka juga menawarkan beragam pilihan minuman beralkohol dan koktail, serta teras luar ruangan yang nyaman saat cuaca hangat. Namun, daya tarik utamanya adalah makanan Cina autentik dari daerah Tiongkok yang tidak bisa Anda temukan di tempat lain di Wisconsin.

reviews.author: Daniel Tian
reviews.text: 羊骨汤面很好，只是羊骨（可选）份量太大了。另一招牌是调味很出色的担担面，见仁见智，北方人可能会觉得面条不够劲道。此外是Madison少有的服务很好的中餐馆。
reviews.textTranslated: Mie kuah tulang dombanya enak, tapi porsi tulang dombanya (opsional) terlalu besar. Hidangan khas lainnya adalah mi Dan Dan yang berbumbu sempurna; pendapat orang-orang beragam, dan mereka yang berasal dari Tiongkok utara mungkin merasa minya kurang kenyal. Selain itu, restoran ini merupakan salah satu dari sedikit restoran Cina di Madison dengan pelayanan yang sangat baik.

reviews.author: Cody Harris
reviews.text: Excellent food with great service! Highly recommended!!!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan yang luar biasa dengan pelayanan yang hebat! Sangat direkomendasikan!!!

reviews.author: Gregory Kelley
reviews.text: Sorry for no pictures... BUT! my friend and I went here today. Honestly, hidden gem. The special was really good too. Cozy atmosphere and beautiful decor... Those cups though. Gotta get me some cups like that! Lol. All joking aside, I'd say give it a try. I can see myself coming back here. Thank you
reviews.textTranslated: Maaf tidak ada foto... TAPI! Saya dan teman saya pergi ke sini hari ini. Jujur, ini tempat yang tersembunyi dan istimewa. Menu spesialnya juga enak banget. Suasananya nyaman dan dekorasinya cantik... Tapi cangkirnya itu lho. Saya harus punya cangkir seperti itu! Haha. Bercanda saja, saya sarankan untuk mencobanya. Saya rasa saya akan kembali ke sini lagi. Terima kasih.

reviews.author: Alex Wang
reviews.text:
I swear this place was on Willy st during the Pandemic but it's now near the Essen Haus. I don't know if this was by design or the original building was like this already, but I was greeted with a Hutong like alley when stepping through the first door. It's very nice to see the attempt at reproducing the Hutong ambiance with Chinese arts and calligraphies hanging in the wall. You'd see "please wait here to be seated" sign there but no one would get you. I instead had to open their 2nd inner door to get to their actual dining area. Oh you'd also be greeted with some Chinese incense, in the waiting area as well as their dining room. I kinda like the smell but I know some may find it too strong.

The menu doesn't have a lot of options listed. I'd recommend looking it up online first before heading there. Make sure you actually like the choices, most of which I'd call Asian bar food. This is NOT a diss. It's certainly a surprise to me but I don't mind it at all. They didn't have their famous spicy beef noodle soup. Instead they had some kind of lamb shank soup noodle. $16 with no veggies or meat. The soup was fantastic. Noodles were tender. I highly recommend, but make sure you get something else too otherwise you'd leave without feeling full. They also sell the actual lamb shank on the side, for the same price as the noodle soup. I also got their daily special, which was sweet beef rice bowl. It's like Lu Rou Fan if you know what this is. I think the sweet beef bowl originated from Japan. The bowl was very good too. The beef was thinly sliced, tender and juicy.

I didn't take any pictures. Very unlike me. But the place was dimmly lit so pix wouldn't turn out well anyway.

Oh I almost forgot. I got their lamb skewers too. $4 a piece with minimum of 3 to order. They were very very good as well when hot/warm.

The 1 less score was because the portions and ingredients don't quite match the prices. I wasn't full after eating all that. I'm a small (Tinder scale) 5'8 guy. I enjoy the flavors of every dish. Overall I had a good dining experience.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya bersumpah tempat ini dulunya berada di Willy Street selama pandemi, tetapi sekarang dekat dengan Essen Haus. Saya tidak tahu apakah ini disengaja atau bangunan aslinya memang sudah seperti ini, tetapi saya disambut dengan suasana gang seperti Hutong saat melangkah masuk melalui pintu pertama. Sangat menyenangkan melihat upaya untuk mereproduksi suasana Hutong dengan seni dan kaligrafi Tiongkok yang tergantung di dinding. Anda akan melihat tanda "silakan tunggu di sini untuk dipersilakan duduk" di sana, tetapi tidak ada yang akan memanggil Anda. Saya malah harus membuka pintu dalam kedua mereka untuk sampai ke area makan mereka yang sebenarnya. Oh, Anda juga akan disambut dengan aroma dupa Tiongkok, di area tunggu maupun ruang makan mereka. Saya agak menyukai aromanya, tetapi saya tahu beberapa orang mungkin menganggapnya terlalu kuat.

Menu tidak memiliki banyak pilihan. Saya sarankan untuk mencarinya secara online terlebih dahulu sebelum pergi ke sana. Pastikan Anda benar-benar menyukai pilihannya, yang sebagian besar saya sebut makanan bar Asia. Ini BUKAN kritik. Ini memang mengejutkan saya, tapi saya sama sekali tidak keberatan. Mereka tidak punya sup mie daging sapi pedas terkenal mereka. Sebagai gantinya, mereka punya semacam sup mie betis domba. $16 tanpa sayuran atau daging. Supnya fantastis. Mienya lembut. Saya sangat merekomendasikan, tetapi pastikan Anda memesan sesuatu yang lain juga, kalau tidak Anda akan pulang tanpa merasa kenyang. Mereka juga menjual betis domba asli secara terpisah, dengan harga yang sama dengan sup mie. Saya juga memesan menu spesial harian mereka, yaitu nasi mangkuk daging sapi manis. Mirip dengan Lu Rou Fan jika Anda tahu apa itu. Saya rasa nasi mangkuk daging sapi manis berasal dari Jepang. Nasi mangkuknya juga sangat enak. Daging sapinya diiris tipis, empuk, dan juicy.

Saya tidak mengambil foto. Sangat tidak seperti saya. Tapi tempatnya agak remang-remang jadi fotonya tidak akan bagus.

Oh, hampir lupa. Saya juga memesan sate domba mereka. $4 per potong dengan minimal 3 potong. Rasanya juga sangat enak saat masih panas/hangat.

Pengurangan 1 poin disebabkan karena porsi dan bahan-bahan yang disajikan tidak sesuai dengan harganya. Saya tidak merasa kenyang setelah makan semua itu. Saya pria bertubuh kecil (menurut standar Tinder) dengan tinggi 173 cm. Saya menikmati cita rasa setiap hidangan. Secara keseluruhan, pengalaman makan saya menyenangkan.

reviews.author: Micah Ricke
reviews.text: I lived in Beijing for four years and felt so at home here! 倍儿爽啊！
reviews.textTranslated: Saya tinggal di Beijing selama empat tahun dan merasa sangat betah di sini! 倍儿爽啊！

reviews.author: Alexis Oxborough
reviews.text: Great food, small cozy space, the dan dan noodle was surprisingly spicy but very tasty, and the broth was excellent. Would go again!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan enak, tempat kecil yang nyaman, mi dan dannya pedas tapi sangat lezat, dan kuahnya sangat lezat. Saya akan kembali lagi!

reviews.author: Robert Radosevich
reviews.text: The best pot stickers I've had.  Had a very good beef and rice special.  But my wife had the Dan Dan noodles. Delicious, just the right amount of heat and sauce.  Going back.
reviews.textTranslated: Potsticker terenak yang pernah saya makan. Saya pesan menu spesial daging sapi dan nasi yang sangat enak. Tapi istri saya pesan mi Dan Dan. Enak, pedas dan sausnya pas. Bakal balik lagi nih.

reviews.author: Ben Liang
reviews.text: Very pricey but very wholesome
reviews.textTranslated: Harganya sangat mahal tetapi sangat menyehatkan.

reviews.author: Allen Irvine
reviews.text: Lots of tasty Szechuan peppercorn sauces. Loved the dan dan and the pork belly. Like six beers on tap.
reviews.textTranslated: Banyak saus lada Sichuan yang lezat. Suka sekali dengan dan dan dan perut babi. Ada sekitar enam jenis bir yang tersedia.

reviews.author: Jiho Kim
reviews.text: 양꼬치가 맛있었다. 메뉴에 진로소주 375ml로 적혀있는데 참이슬 750ml가 나와서 당황했지만 오히려 좋았다. 누들에 나오는 국물이 괜찮았지만 안주로 먹을 국물요리가 하나쯤 더 있으면 좋겠다는 생각이다.
reviews.textTranslated: Sate dombanya lezat. Menu mencantumkan 375ml soju Jinro, tapi saya terkejut menerima 750ml Chamisul, tapi ternyata cukup nikmat. Kuah kaldu yang disajikan bersama mi lumayan, tapi saya berharap ada kuah lain untuk menemani makan malam ini.

reviews.author: Karee Anderson
reviews.text: We had an incredible dinner at Hutong and I can't wait to share about it. Our group was vegetarian, and we ordered every thing on the menu that didn't have meat. We shared all the plates between the three of us, and it was a perfect amount, everything went above and beyond our expectations. The service was incredible and the atmosphere was more than we could dream of  - small, intimate, unique, beautiful, comfortable. We went to bed and woke up thinking about our meal there, and can't wait to return!! Thank you, Hutong!
reviews.textTranslated: Kami menikmati makan malam yang luar biasa di Hutong dan saya tak sabar untuk berbagi cerita tentangnya.
