Rombongan kami vegetarian, dan kami memesan semua menu yang tidak mengandung daging. Kami berbagi semua hidangan untuk kami bertiga, dan porsinya pas sekali, semuanya melebihi ekspektasi kami. Pelayanannya luar biasa dan suasananya lebih dari yang bisa kami bayangkan - kecil, intim, unik, indah, dan nyaman. Kami tidur dan bangun sambil memikirkan makanan kami di sana, dan tak sabar untuk kembali!! Terima kasih, Hutong!

reviews.author: Annie Smith
reviews.text: Dandan Noodles were amazing! Can’t wait to go back!
reviews.textTranslated: Mie Dandannya luar biasa! Tak sabar untuk kembali!

reviews.author: Armando Magana
reviews.text: Server Ana was great, had some good recs and a good vibe.  Greens beans were banging. Cold, sweet, garlicky goodness. Scallion pancakes were small, get two orders. vegetable pancakes were good, the sauce was even better. Dip your scallion pancakes in that stuff too. The lamb skewers were excellent. Dip everything in the chili sauce actually, who cares, live your whole life in ecstatic bliss. Smaller portions on most of these lil plates, but they are priced accordingly. Food costs are high these days. Will be back soon to try the lamb shank noodle soup and double up on green beans. Have always loved the plaka tavern spot, gonna haunt this space regularly. Long live hutong.
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayan Ana hebat, punya beberapa rekomendasi bagus dan suasana yang menyenangkan. Buncisnya mantap. Dingin, manis, dan beraroma bawang putih. Panekuk daun bawangnya kecil, jadi dua pesanan. Panekuk sayurannya enak, sausnya bahkan lebih enak lagi. Celupkan juga panekuk daun bawang Anda ke dalamnya. Sate dombanya luar biasa. Celupkan semuanya ke dalam saus cabai, siapa peduli, nikmati hidup Anda dalam kebahagiaan yang luar biasa. Porsinya lebih kecil di sebagian besar piring kecil ini, tetapi harganya sesuai. Harga makanan sedang tinggi akhir-akhir ini. Akan segera kembali untuk mencoba sup mi kaki domba dan memesan buncis dua kali. Saya selalu suka kedai Plaka, dan akan sering mengunjungi tempat ini. Hidup hutong.

reviews.author: Seanna Whalen
reviews.text: Hutong is absolutely a gem. Everything was an absolute 11/10.
reviews.textTranslated: Hutong benar-benar permata. Semuanya benar-benar 11/10.

reviews.author: Maria Oliveri
reviews.text:
We were in Madison for the weekend and wanted a new place to try and we found Hutong online. It was a block away from Hotel Ruby Marie.
What draw us to this place which apparently just opened up was the small menu. I find that when there aren’t too many choices the chef can focus on perfecting his craft for that set menu.
The calamari legs were cooked perfectly! We ordered 2 noodle dishes ; the portions were perfect and WE greatly appreciated the el dente texture of both dishes. You can add protein to any of the noodle dishes with braised egg.
Service was great and we definitely will go back. I recommend!!!!
reviews.textTranslated:
Kami berada di Madison selama akhir pekan dan ingin mencoba tempat baru, dan kami menemukan Hutong secara online. Lokasinya satu blok dari Hotel Ruby Marie.
Yang menarik kami ke tempat ini, yang tampaknya baru buka, adalah menunya yang sedikit. Saya merasa bahwa ketika pilihannya tidak terlalu banyak, koki dapat fokus menyempurnakan keahliannya untuk menu set tersebut.
Kaki cumi-cumi dimasak dengan sempurna! Kami memesan 2 hidangan mi; porsinya sempurna dan KAMI sangat menghargai tekstur el dente dari kedua hidangan tersebut. Anda dapat menambahkan protein ke hidangan mi apa pun dengan telur rebus.
Pelayanannya luar biasa dan kami pasti akan kembali. Saya merekomendasikannya!!!!

reviews.author: Lisa Fishering
reviews.text: This place is an absolute hidden gem. The food is delicious, the space is lovely, and the staff is delightful. Highly recommend.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini benar-benar permata tersembunyi. Makanannya lezat, tempatnya nyaman, dan stafnya ramah. Sangat direkomendasikan.

reviews.author: Katherine Smith
reviews.text: This is my favorite new restaurant in Madison. The spicy beef noodle soup is amazing! Such a cool, cozy space too. A must try if you haven’t been yet!
reviews.textTranslated: Ini restoran baru favorit saya di Madison. Sup mi sapi pedasnya luar biasa! Tempatnya juga keren dan nyaman. Wajib dicoba kalau belum pernah ke sana!

reviews.author: Madeleine Zeller
reviews.text: Very tasty food and a warm, cozy atmosphere. We shared the tofu skin salad, fried seafood dumplings, and lamb noodle soup (without the lamb shank). The soup was so good I forgot to take a picture. Highly recommend!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya sangat lezat dan suasananya hangat dan nyaman. Kami berbagi salad kulit tahu, pangsit goreng seafood, dan sup mi domba (tanpa betis domba). Supnya begitu lezat sampai saya lupa memotretnya. Sangat direkomendasikan!

reviews.author: Jess Draws
reviews.text:
We had the beef noodle soup, dan dan noodles, green beans, pork egg rolls, scallion pancakes, and yuzu and melon sodas, all for carry out.

Noodle soup: Broth and ingredients packaged separately! Critical for good travel. The beef was unbelievably tender. The braised egg added something special.

Dan Dan noodles: Perfect texture, so savory, a bit spicy.

Green beans, pancakes, egg rolls all wonderful. The soda choices were unique and fun.

Would recommend to anyone!
reviews.textTranslated:
Kami memesan sup mi daging sapi, mi dan dan, buncis, lumpia babi, panekuk daun bawang, serta soda yuzu dan melon, semuanya untuk dibawa pulang.

Sup mi: Kaldu dan bahan-bahan dikemas terpisah! Sangat penting untuk perjalanan yang nyaman. Daging sapinya luar biasa empuk. Telur rebusnya menambahkan sentuhan istimewa.

Mi Dan Dan: Teksturnya sempurna, gurih, sedikit pedas.

Buncis, panekuk, lumpia, semuanya lezat. Pilihan sodanya unik dan menyenangkan.

Rekomendasi untuk siapa pun!

reviews.author: Spencer Baldwin
reviews.text: Insane DanDan noodles, cool place!
reviews.textTranslated: Mie DanDan yang gila, tempatnya keren!

reviews.author: Jordan G.L. Hardin
reviews.text: Hutong is delicious and never disappoints. From the classic Dan Dan Noodles, to their signature Beef Noodle Soup (which is so warming but also light and flavorful), to their must-have cumin Lamb Skewers. Straight forward and wonderful.
reviews.textTranslated: Hutong itu enak dan tidak pernah mengecewakan. Mulai dari Mie Dan Dan klasik, hingga Sup Mie Daging Sapi andalan mereka (yang sangat menghangatkan tetapi juga ringan dan kaya rasa), sampai Sate Domba jintan yang wajib dicoba. Sederhana dan luar biasa.

reviews.author: Jessica Jiang
reviews.text:
We went there based on the reviews, but found that this restaurant is very dishonest, the bill is tampered, the tip is also tampered, I will NEVER go there again!!!!!!

Your reply is so untrue and trying to hide things up. I have never met any restaurant that can change the tip without my permission. You cheated on the bill, we only order 2 hot beef noodles, and you charged 3. If we did not realize, you will stole the extra money, you should be shame and guilty for what you did, if I know that you don't want your face, I should call police right away.

I dont care about the tips if you did good for serving, but definitely you are not. And if you only want the tips, you should put a note on your door  "do not come to the restaurant if you not paying 18% or more for the tips, and this restaurant only care about tips".  And obviously the only thing you mentioned is the TIP, you covered up the whole story.  You are afraid to admit that you change the tip and provided the wrong bill in the beginning. And one more thing you lied, your menu showing that 6 or more ppl will be charged 18% tips, not 5. You make this things up!!!!! Unless from today on, you will change your menu again!

If not being told in the beginning, TIP is whatever the customer wants to pay, not force to pay. If you only care about the tips and like to change the bills, you should shut down your business and being a robber.  That's more easy for you to get money!!!!

You have the right to refuse serving anyone, but you will never be covered up and erase  with what you did. The things you done will be with you forever!!!

I have been to so many Chinese restaurant and never met such shameless people. Dont aways mention you are a Chinese restaurant to make people think you are puniness, you are losing face to China by what you did and said!!!!!!
reviews.textTranslated:
Kami pergi ke sana berdasarkan ulasan, tetapi ternyata restoran ini sangat tidak jujur, tagihannya dimanipulasi, tipnya juga dimanipulasi, saya TIDAK AKAN PERNAH pergi ke sana lagi!!!!!!

Balasan Anda sangat tidak benar dan mencoba menyembunyikan sesuatu. Saya belum pernah bertemu restoran yang bisa mengubah tip tanpa izin saya. Anda curang dalam tagihan, kami hanya memesan 2 porsi mie sapi pedas, dan Anda menagih 3 porsi. Jika kami tidak menyadarinya, Anda akan mencuri uang tambahan itu, Anda seharusnya malu dan merasa bersalah atas apa yang Anda lakukan, jika saya tahu Anda tidak ingin dipermalukan, saya akan langsung menghubungi polisi.

Saya tidak peduli dengan tip jika Anda melayani dengan baik, tetapi jelas Anda tidak. Dan jika Anda hanya menginginkan tip, Anda harus memasang catatan di pintu Anda "jangan datang ke restoran jika Anda tidak membayar 18% atau lebih untuk tip, dan restoran ini hanya peduli pada tip". Dan jelas satu-satunya hal yang Anda sebutkan adalah TIP, Anda menutupi seluruh cerita. Anda takut mengakui bahwa Anda mengubah tip dan memberikan tagihan yang salah sejak awal. Dan satu hal lagi yang kamu bohongi, menu kamu menunjukkan bahwa 6 orang atau lebih akan dikenakan tip 18%, bukan 5%. Kamu mengarang semua ini!!!!! Kecuali mulai hari ini, kamu akan mengubah menu kamu lagi!

Jika tidak diberitahu sejak awal, tip adalah apa pun yang ingin dibayar pelanggan, bukan dipaksa untuk membayar. Jika kamu hanya peduli pada tip dan suka mengubah tagihan, kamu harus menutup bisnismu dan menjadi perampok. Itu lebih mudah bagimu untuk mendapatkan uang!!!!

Kamu berhak menolak melayani siapa pun, tetapi kamu tidak akan pernah bisa menutupi dan menghapus apa yang telah kamu lakukan. Hal-hal yang telah kamu lakukan akan selalu bersamamu selamanya!!!

Aku sudah pernah ke banyak restoran Cina dan belum pernah bertemu orang yang tidak tahu malu seperti ini. Jangan selalu menyebut dirimu sebagai restoran Cina untuk membuat orang berpikir kamu lemah, kamu kehilangan muka di mata Cina dengan apa yang telah kamu lakukan dan katakan!!!!!!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
We have the right to refuse serving you! Please don’t go to restaurant for dine in.
We have policy of 18% Gratuity for party of 5 or more. Our server didn’t add the gratuity on your bill because she thought your group was nice; especially when the gentleman complimented our food was good and authentic. After taking care your group for more than 1 hour and giving lots of candies to your two kids, our server got 15% tips. That was ok with her, just $2 less from the 18% gratuity policy
We’re shocked that. 4 days later, you called in and told us that you only want to pay $7.4 tips for your bill of $78.6.
You were not telling the truth on the review. You should be do care about the $4. Please do take out only, you could save more on the tip. If you think because we’re Chinese restaurant, so you can tip less than 10%. You should be shamed!

reviews.author: ChipmunksChicken MO
reviews.text: 头一回见这么奇葩的老板！服务员没问题，有问题是这个老板！20刀一碗面，难吃分量又少，还不让说！绝了！（该给的钱一分没少！顾客有权利提出食物不好），老板不想着怎么改进食物，反而在这全网怼差评，简直是绝！
reviews.textTranslated: Ini pertama kalinya aku melihat bos yang aneh seperti ini! Pelayannya baik-baik saja, masalahnya ada pada bos ini! Semangkuk mi seharga $20, mengerikan, porsinya kecil, dan tidak ada yang boleh komplain! Luar biasa! (Aku membayar persis seperti yang seharusnya! Pelanggan berhak komplain soal makanan), tapi alih-alih berusaha memperbaiki makanannya, bosnya malah memposting ulasan negatif di seluruh internet. Luar biasa!

reviews.author: Rebecca Wheeler (beckycaret)
reviews.text: This place is awesome and it’s now my go-to for winter soup. So delicious!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini keren banget dan sekarang jadi favorit saya untuk sup musim dingin. Enak banget!

reviews.author: Anne Leahy
reviews.text: Everything I’ve ordered here I have enjoyed. Service is great. A must try for people with taste buds!
reviews.textTranslated: Semua yang saya pesan di sini saya nikmati. Pelayanannya luar biasa. Wajib dicoba bagi yang punya selera!

reviews.author: Erin White
reviews.text: Great food & wonderful service.  The beef bone noodle soup was perfect comfort for a rainy night.  First time having tofu skin and it was sublime, loved the fresh bites of celery & mushroom added. Thank you so much for a wonderful experience!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan enak & pelayanan luar biasa. Sup mie tulang sapi sangat cocok untuk menghangatkan badan di malam yang hujan. Ini pertama kalinya saya mencoba kulit tahu dan rasanya luar biasa, saya suka potongan seledri dan jamur segar yang ditambahkan. Terima kasih banyak atas pengalaman yang luar biasa!

reviews.author: Alishah Jamal (AJ)
reviews.text: 5/5 had the spicy beef Noodle soup, 4 Lamb skewers, and the tofu salad ($65 total) and each item was superb. The lamb was so tender and juicy, and the beef Noodle soup... Omg. Out of all the soups that I've had throughout my life, this is in the top 3 best I've ever had, and I've had a lot of soups from all over the world. Just super tasty broth and the beef was fantastic too. I cannot recommend enough!!
reviews.textTranslated: 5/5 untuk sup mi daging sapi pedas, 4 tusuk sate domba, dan salad tahu (total $65), dan setiap hidangannya luar biasa. Daging dombanya empuk dan juicy, dan sup mi daging sapinya... Astaga. Dari semua sup yang pernah saya makan sepanjang hidup saya, ini termasuk dalam 3 sup terbaik yang pernah saya makan, dan saya sudah mencoba banyak sup dari seluruh dunia. Kuahnya super lezat dan daging sapinya juga fantastis. Saya sangat merekomendasikannya!

reviews.author: Lena Sima
reviews.text: Amazing chinese food, you should try Dan Dan and Lo Rou Fan, so delicious!!!!!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan Cina yang luar biasa, kamu harus coba Dan Dan dan Lo Rou Fan, enak banget!!!!!

reviews.author: Александра Егошина
reviews.text: The food is delicious and authentic, I really enjoyed it! The service is 10/10, and the staff is friendly, polite, and always ready to help. I've got a feeling that the owners love what they do, their attitude is always so so kind! You should definitely go there, if you want a little bit of Chinese flavor in your life!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya lezat dan autentik, saya sangat menikmatinya! Pelayanannya 10/10, dan stafnya ramah, sopan, dan selalu siap membantu. Saya merasa pemiliknya mencintai pekerjaan mereka, sikap mereka selalu sangat baik! Anda wajib ke sana jika ingin merasakan sedikit cita rasa Cina dalam hidup Anda!

reviews.author: Yujun Choi
reviews.text:
가격대는 좀 비싸지만 확실히 그 값을 하는 음식점이다. 탄탄면은 살짝 매콤하면서도 고소해서 맛있고, 비프 누들은 국물이 진하고 고기도 맛있다. 양꼬치는 한국 것과 비슷한 맛에 잡내도 별로 안나서 좋다. 전반적으로 만족하고 추천한다!
조명이 좀 어두운 게 유일하게 아쉬운 점인듯?
reviews.textTranslated: Kisaran harganya agak mahal, tapi benar-benar sepadan. Tantanmyunnya sedikit pedas namun kaya rasa dan lezat, dan mie daging sapinya memiliki kuah yang kaya dan daging yang enak. Sate dombanya mirip dengan sate Korea, dengan rasa daging yang sedikit gurih. Secara keseluruhan, saya puas dan merekomendasikannya! Satu-satunya kekurangan adalah pencahayaannya agak redup.

reviews.author: Tian Mei
reviews.text:
Shame on you!

Will never visit again and wanna people know this ‘famous’ restaurant a little more based on what happens on me.

I have visited here last week, and check my credit card statement is $4 more than what I signed with tips. $4 is a small amount, but that action is unbelievable. I never meet that before. It is fraud actually. Be careful to keep a copy of the receipt you sign and remember the tips you signed.

Actually I do not care $4, but this action is first time happens in restaurant, it is unacceptable.

So I called the restaurant to told them this thing. And I found more than what I expected.

The man who pick up the phone first did not admit that we visit there last week. Then he said why I give less than 18% tips, he said no one give tips less than 18%. He keep blamed me give less than 18% tips. He never think charge more money than what you sign is wrong and I did not hear any sorry but a lot complains.

I said your accountant give me the wrong statement. I only order two beef noodles, but she charged me for 3 noodles. And I found it and ask her to adjust it. (I found it since a noodle is $17 you can easily feel the total amount is wrong)

Be careful! They will try to charge you more on the bill. Check your bill before you sign. And they want to fraud you as more as they can. Not only tips but also bills.

Also, the guy who picked up the phone is very rude. I guess he is the chef who mentioned in the previous reviews that the chef chase them a block after leave the restaurant.

That is ridiculous and your license should be revoked.

Received the reply from the shameless owner, they did not say sorry for their stolen action and their rude replies. The owner has no sense of shame.
Do you really think that we care about the candies you gave to us? Do you really think that all people should force to pay more?

With a friendly reminder to you, we called your restaurant in a polite way to talk maybe you need to pay attention to the accountant and never think to have the rude reply back and you even did not admit that we went to the restaurant, and HELLO, right now you know we went to the restaurant? Is that what one of your strategies to reply to the one star review? First to say, "you did not come to our restaurant, we never serve you"?

Shameless people ever!  So disgusting!

This just a reminder to people, if you still need to go this disgusting restaurant, at least pay attention to your bill and later charged tips.
reviews.textTranslated:
Malu banget!

Saya tidak akan pernah berkunjung lagi dan ingin orang-orang mengenal restoran 'terkenal' ini lebih baik berdasarkan apa yang terjadi pada saya.

Saya berkunjung ke sini minggu lalu, dan memeriksa laporan kartu kredit saya, ternyata $4 lebih mahal dari yang saya tandatangani dengan tip. $4 memang jumlah yang kecil, tetapi tindakan itu sungguh tidak masuk akal. Saya belum pernah mengalami hal seperti itu sebelumnya. Ini sebenarnya penipuan. Hati-hati simpan salinan struk yang Anda tandatangani dan ingat tip yang Anda tandatangani.

Sebenarnya saya tidak peduli $4, tetapi tindakan ini baru pertama kali terjadi di restoran, sungguh tidak dapat diterima.

Jadi saya menelepon restoran untuk memberi tahu mereka hal ini. Dan saya menemukan lebih dari yang saya harapkan.

Pria yang mengangkat telepon pertama kali tidak mengakui bahwa kami berkunjung ke sana minggu lalu. Lalu dia bertanya mengapa saya memberi tip kurang dari 18%. Dia bilang tidak ada yang memberi tip kurang dari 18%. Dia terus menyalahkan saya karena memberi tip kurang dari 18%. Dia tidak pernah berpikir menagih uang lebih dari yang Anda tandatangani itu salah dan saya tidak mendengar permintaan maaf, tetapi banyak keluhan.

Saya bilang akuntan Anda memberi saya laporan yang salah. Saya hanya memesan dua mi sapi, tetapi dia menagih saya untuk 3 mi. Dan saya menemukannya dan memintanya untuk menyesuaikannya. (Saya menemukannya karena satu mi harganya $17, Anda bisa dengan mudah merasakan jumlah totalnya salah)

Hati-hati! Mereka akan mencoba menagih Anda lebih banyak pada tagihan. Periksa tagihan Anda sebelum Anda menandatangani. Dan mereka ingin menipu Anda sebanyak mungkin. Bukan hanya tip tetapi juga tagihan.

Juga, orang yang mengangkat telepon itu sangat kasar. Saya kira dia adalah koki yang menyebutkan dalam ulasan sebelumnya bahwa koki mengejar mereka satu blok setelah meninggalkan restoran.

Itu konyol dan lisensi Anda harus dicabut.

Menerima balasan dari pemilik yang tidak tahu malu, mereka tidak meminta maaf atas tindakan pencurian dan balasan kasar mereka. Pemiliknya tidak punya rasa malu.
Apakah Anda benar-benar berpikir bahwa kami peduli dengan permen yang Anda berikan kepada kami? Apakah Anda benar-benar berpikir bahwa semua orang harus dipaksa membayar lebih?

Sebagai pengingat, kami menelepon restoran Anda dengan sopan untuk berbicara. Mungkin Anda perlu memperhatikan akuntannya dan jangan pernah berpikir untuk mendapatkan balasan kasar. Anda bahkan tidak mengakui bahwa kami pergi ke restoran itu, dan HALO, sekarang Anda tahu kami pergi ke restoran itu? Apakah itu salah satu strategi Anda untuk membalas ulasan bintang satu? Pertama-tama dengan mengatakan, "Anda tidak datang ke restoran kami, kami tidak pernah melayani Anda"?

Orang-orang yang tidak tahu malu! Sangat menjijikkan!

Ini hanya pengingat, jika Anda masih harus pergi ke restoran menjijikkan ini, setidaknya perhatikan tagihan Anda dan tip yang akan diberikan nanti.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
We have the right to refuse serving you! Please don’t go to restaurant for dine in ever.
We have policy of 18% Gratuity for party of 5 or more. Our server didn’t add the gratuity on your bill because she thought your group was nice; especially when the gentleman complimented our food was good and authentic. After taking care your group for more than 1 hour and giving lots of candies to your two kids, our server finally got 15% tips. That was ok with her, just $2 less from the 18% gratuity policy
We’re shocked that. 4 days later, you called in and told us that you only paid $7.4 tips for your bill of $78.6. You’re not telling the truth. If you think because we’re Chinese restaurant, so you can change your words, tip less than 10% to your servers, and make up faults. You’re stealing from those hard working servers. You should be shamed!
孔明曰“我从未见过有如此厚颜无耻之人”

reviews.author: Elliott Winter
reviews.text: Little hole in the wall place. Passed it and just got that feeling that it was probably really good food. Feeling was right! Don't let the small menue fool you, everything is on there because it is fantastic. Spicy beef noodles were great (I could use a little more spice but made my nose run) and my gf got the Lu Rou Fan. Wow, I think the Lu Rou Fan is one of my new favorit dishes. Definitely give this place a try.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempatnya kecil dan tersembunyi. Saya melewatinya dan langsung merasa makanannya pasti enak sekali. Dan firasat saya benar! Jangan tertipu oleh menu yang kecil, semuanya ada di sana karena memang fantastis. Mie daging sapi pedasnya enak sekali (saya rasa perlu sedikit lebih pedas, tapi sampai membuat hidung saya berair) dan pacar saya memesan Lu Rou Fan. Wah, saya rasa Lu Rou Fan adalah salah satu hidangan favorit baru saya. Pasti patut dicoba.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Elliott,
Thank you for the kind words. We’re glad you and your girlfriend enjoyed our food. Your words before left our door made a good Sunday night to our team!
-Hutong

reviews.author: Daniel Fogel
reviews.text: Very friendly service. Delicious veggie pancakes and scallion pancakes. Would have liked a dish with chicken in it too
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanan sangat ramah. Pancake sayuran dan pancake daun bawangnya lezat. Saya berharap ada juga hidangan dengan ayam di dalamnya.

reviews.author: Sasha Rosser
reviews.text: Small menu, but everything on it is delicious. Highly recommend getting the lamb skewers and dan dan noodles with braided egg & Szechuan chili oil sauce.
reviews.textTranslated: Menunya sedikit, tetapi semuanya lezat. Sangat direkomendasikan untuk mencoba sate domba dan mi dan dan dengan telur kepang dan saus minyak cabai Szechuan.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Sasha,
Thank you for recommending our lamb skewers and Dan Dan noodles!
-Hutong

reviews.author: Mike Van Esler
reviews.text:
I don't normally write reviews but I was so impressed with Hutong that I had to hit it up with 5 stars. The menu is small, but that's a sign that you're going to get good food. Think of it like playing baseball or football: Are you gonna shine if you're trying to play all positions? Hell no, you gotta focus in and get good at one or two.

We tried three items off their menu: Dan Dan Noodles, the Beef Bone Noodle Soup, and the Braised Pork Rice. All three easily get five stars from me. They also have Baijiu if you're looking to get tilted off 53% ABV hard liquor! I'll be coming back to try every single thing off their menu and I think you should too
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya biasanya tidak menulis ulasan, tapi saya sangat terkesan dengan Hutong sampai-sampai saya harus memberikan 5 bintang. Menunya memang sedikit, tapi itu pertanda Anda akan mendapatkan makanan yang enak. Bayangkan seperti bermain bisbol atau sepak bola: Apakah Anda akan bersinar jika mencoba bermain di semua posisi? Tentu saja tidak, Anda harus fokus dan mahir di satu atau dua posisi.

Kami mencoba tiga menu mereka: Mie Dan Dan, Sup Mie Tulang Sapi, dan Nasi Babi Rebus. Ketiganya dengan mudah mendapatkan lima bintang dari saya. Mereka juga punya Baijiu jika Anda ingin mencoba minuman keras dengan kadar alkohol 53%! Saya akan kembali untuk mencoba semua menu mereka dan saya rasa Anda juga harus mencobanya.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Mike,
Thank you for the 5 star review! We’re looking forward to serve you again!
-Hutong

reviews.author: Janmesh Patel
reviews.text: Awesome food, with plenty of vegetarian options! The food is a bit on the sweeter side for my taste, but still delicious. I had take out so the scallion pancakes were a bit cold, but even then they tasted better than most other restaurants’ scallion pancakes when they’re hot! I can’t wait to try the food again, next time I’m going to dine in.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya luar biasa, dengan banyak pilihan vegetarian! Makanannya agak terlalu manis untuk seleraku, tapi tetap lezat. Aku pesan antar, jadi panekuk daun bawangnya agak dingin, tapi rasanya tetap lebih enak daripada panekuk daun bawang di kebanyakan restoran lain saat masih panas! Aku tak sabar untuk mencoba makanannya lagi, lain kali aku akan makan di restoran.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Janmesh,
Thank you for the good review! We’re looking forward to serve you again in our dining room or on the heated patio!
-Hutong

reviews.author: Danbing Chen
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the 5 star review!

reviews.author: Hyeyoung Koh
reviews.text: lamb skew and noodle soup were so good
reviews.textTranslated: Sate domba dan sup mie-nya enak banget.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the good review and enjoyed our food at Hutong!

reviews.author: Alex Li
reviews.text: You would be lucky to have their Braised Pork Rice because it seems like it often runs out quickly before they close.  It is so delicious and authentic that sometimes I order two of them.
reviews.textTranslated: Anda akan beruntung jika bisa menikmati Nasi Babi Rebus mereka karena sepertinya sering habis sebelum tutup. Saking lezat dan autentiknya, terkadang saya memesan dua.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Alex,
Thank you for the 5 star review and kind words!
We’re making some adjustments for our serving items. We’ll not serve Braised Pork Rice on Wednesday and Thursday.
Please visit us on Monday, Friday, Saturday or Sunday, if you’re craving for the Pork Rice! Sorry for the inconvenience.
Best,
-Hutong

reviews.author: ROY PERKINS
reviews.text: Had great noodle soup. But if you don't order the lamb skewer appetizer you're missing out.
reviews.textTranslated: Sup mie-nya enak banget. Tapi kalau kamu nggak pesan sate domba sebagai hidangan pembuka, kamu rugi banget.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the good review! We’re glad that you enjoyed our lamb skewers and noodle soup.

reviews.author: Etienne Devereaux
reviews.text: Didn’t want to write a bad review but after the bad dining experience I have to . The appetizers were ok but then the entrees (spicy beef noodle) were lukewarm, grease and separated oil all on top, refrigerated very over cooked beef, overcooked egg, not spicy or hot or flavorful, nothing seemed fresh. We did not complain or ask for any discount and paid our bill and left  but then the chef chased us half a block away demanding  to know why we did not like the food. we simply said we did not enjoy it and gave reasons but any reason he disagreed and said we did not understand Chinese food. Again we did not want to leave review but the man chased us outside.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sebenarnya tidak ingin menulis ulasan buruk, tetapi setelah pengalaman makan yang buruk, saya harus melakukannya. Makanan pembukanya lumayan, tetapi hidangan utamanya (mie daging sapi pedas) suam-suam kuku, berminyak dan terpisah-pisah di atasnya, daging sapi yang didinginkan terlalu matang, telur terlalu matang, tidak pedas, tidak panas, dan tidak beraroma, tidak ada yang tampak segar. Kami tidak mengeluh atau meminta diskon dan membayar tagihan lalu pergi, tetapi kemudian koki mengejar kami setengah blok jauhnya dan menuntut untuk mengetahui mengapa kami tidak menyukai makanan tersebut. Kami hanya mengatakan bahwa kami tidak menikmatinya dan memberikan alasan, tetapi alasan apa pun tidak dia setujui dan dia mengatakan kami tidak mengerti masakan Cina. Sekali lagi, kami tidak ingin meninggalkan ulasan, tetapi pria itu mengejar kami keluar.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Etienne,

I’m sorry that you had the bad dining experience at Hutong.

I believe good chefs and honest business owners care about what’s happening when a customer said, I don’t like the food. It helps business doing better.

I appreciate your feedback and nice photo on the review. I also appreciate that you were being nice to told us you don’t like our beef noodle soup after paid.

Our chef didn’t disagree with you or said any words mean you don’t understand Chinese food. I apologize that if his explanation of your concerns made you feel that disagreement and made you feel you don’t understanding Chinese food. I’m ensuring he means your Hutong beef noodle soup is no different to anyone else get.

I feel sincerely sorry for you don’t enjoy our Hutong beef noodle soup.

Zhao Zhao
Owner of Hutong

reviews.author: Michael Miller
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you, Michael, for the 5 stars and photos! We hope to serve you again!
-Zhao
Owner of Hutong

reviews.author: Ashley Campbell
reviews.text: Amazing food.  We had the scallion pancake, salt and pepper squid, spicy beef  soup, and Dan Dan noodles. Everything was delicious! The wait staff were attentive and helpful, and the ambiance is great. This was the first of many trips.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya luar biasa. Kami memesan panekuk daun bawang, cumi garam dan merica, sup daging sapi pedas, dan mi Dan Dan. Semuanya lezat! Pelayannya penuh perhatian dan membantu, dan suasananya luar biasa. Ini adalah kunjungan pertama dari banyak kunjungan berikutnya.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Ashley,
Thank you for the kind words! Our servers- Rita and Frank, were very happy to read the review! Thank you for enjoying at Hutong.
-Zhao
Owner of Hutong

reviews.author: May
reviews.text: The restaurant is small, but the food is surprisingly good and authentic! The bbq lamb is really yummy. Their decoration and silverware are retro and fun.
reviews.textTranslated: Restorannya kecil, tapi makanannya luar biasa enak dan autentik! Daging domba panggangnya benar-benar lezat. Dekorasi dan peralatan makannya bergaya retro dan menyenangkan.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Mei,
Thank you for the 5 star review. We’re glad that you and your friend enjoyed the food and time at Hutong. I hope you enjoyed the time staying in Madison, Wisconsin.
Best wishes!
-Zhao
Owner of Hutong

reviews.author: маргарита шахбанова
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the 5 starts, Maprapnta!

reviews.author: Matthew Morris
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the 5 starts, Matthew.

reviews.author: Candace Kao
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the 5 starts, Candace!

reviews.author: Sam LeMense
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you for the 5 starts, Sam.
-Hutong

reviews.author: Cory Williams
reviews.text: We ordered the Dan Dan noodles and beef noodle soup. Both were warmly spiced and satiating. Tasted very freshly made and noodles had a nice texture. We will be ordering again!
reviews.textTranslated: Kami memesan mi Dan Dan dan sup mi daging sapi. Keduanya berbumbu hangat dan mengenyangkan. Rasanya segar dan mi-nya bertekstur lembut. Kami pasti akan memesan lagi!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Cory,
Thank you for the good review! We’re pleasant that you enjoyed our noodles, and we’re looking forward to serve you again!
Best,
Zhao
-Owner of Hutong

reviews.author: Victoria Vlisides
reviews.text: Fabulous!!! Got the sesame cold noodles - delicious and seemingly authentic. The server was super nice. The ambience is stylish with Asian motifs. Loved the back patio, so beautiful at dusk. Can’t wait to go back.
reviews.textTranslated: Luar biasa!!! Saya memesan mie dingin wijen - enak dan tampaknya otentik. Pelayanannya sangat ramah. Suasana tempatnya bergaya dengan motif Asia. Saya suka teras belakangnya, sangat indah saat senja. Tidak sabar untuk kembali lagi.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Victoria,
Thank you for the good review. We're looking forward to serve you again with dine-in or carry out!
-Hutong

reviews.author: Elizabeth Norton
reviews.text: Ordered almost everything on the menu to share. We had lamb skewers, scallion pancakes, fried pork rice,  spicy beef noodles, and pot stickers. Everything was a 10/10. We thought we may have ordered too much but there was not a crumb left on the plate. Special mention to the fried pork rice. the pork was one of the best things i’ve ever tasted. i also ate the lamb scooby doo style because it was so juicy and tender. tempted to gate keep but won’t, this place is too good to not be shared with the people you hold most dear.
reviews.textTranslated: Kami memesan hampir semua menu untuk dibagi bersama. Kami memesan sate domba, panekuk daun bawang, nasi babi goreng, mie sapi pedas, dan pangsit goreng. Semuanya sempurna (10/10). Kami pikir mungkin kami memesan terlalu banyak, tetapi tidak ada remah pun yang tersisa di piring. Pujian khusus untuk nasi babi goreng. Daging babinya adalah salah satu yang terbaik yang pernah saya cicipi. Saya juga makan domba ala Scooby Doo karena sangat juicy dan empuk. Tergoda untuk merahasiakannya, tetapi tidak akan, tempat ini terlalu bagus untuk tidak dibagikan dengan orang-orang yang paling Anda sayangi.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for enjoy our Braised Pork Rice and Lamb Skwers. Thanks for the good review!

reviews.author: Matthew Bowden
reviews.text: Had the potstickers, scallion pancakes, pork and rice, lamb skewers and spicy beed noodles. Everything we got was 20/10. No misses. Couldn’t recommend more.
reviews.textTranslated: Kami memesan potsticker, panekuk daun bawang, nasi babi, sate domba, dan mi beed pedas. Semua yang kami pesan 20/10. Tidak ada yang kurang. Sangat direkomendasikan.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the good review and kind words!

reviews.author: Noah Brown
reviews.text: Great service and awesome food, definitely will be coming again!
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanan luar biasa dan makanan yang lezat, pasti akan datang lagi!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the kind words! We’re looking forward to serving you again!

reviews.author: Tooli Hampton
reviews.text: Excellent dining experience, really enjoyed the traditional Northern Chinese food. Kind service and very authentic flavors. Will definitely recommend this to anyone in Madison.
reviews.textTranslated: Pengalaman bersantap yang luar biasa, saya sangat menikmati hidangan tradisional Tiongkok Utara. Pelayanannya ramah dan cita rasanya sangat autentik. Pasti akan merekomendasikan tempat ini kepada siapa pun di Madison.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the good review and kind words. We’re glad that you had the excellent dining experience at Hutong!

reviews.author: Karl K
reviews.text: I got the Hutong beef soup signature dish and it was spot on. The scallion pancake "other" was light, not oily. The waiter needed the selection pointed to on the menu.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya memesan hidangan khas sup daging sapi Hutong dan rasanya pas. Panekuk daun bawang "lainnya" ringan, tidak berminyak. Pelayan perlu melihat pilihan menunya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the good review and enjoyed our beef noodle soup!

reviews.author: Mars Donald
reviews.text: 非常糟糕的服务态度 没有评论中说的那么好吃 女服务员的态度十分不好 希望尽快调整
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanannya sangat buruk. Makanannya tidak seenak yang dikatakan ulasan. Para pelayan wanitanya sangat tidak sopan. Saya harap mereka dapat memperbaiki situasi ini sesegera mungkin.
reviews.responseFromOwner: 您好， 众口难调，但是非常遗憾您对我们的食物不够满意。我们一直以来都重视我们的食物和服务的质量。 根据您的信息，我们没有Mars Donald这位客人的就餐记录。望您留下姓名，联系方式，以便于我们了解详情后再做调整。

reviews.author: Bryce Heth
reviews.text: This place is absolutely incredible. We had the Tofu Skin Salad, Pot Stickers, Braised Pork Rice, and the Beef Bone Noodle Soup. All were fantastic and the service was great to match. We will be back frequently!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini benar-benar luar biasa. Kami memesan Salad Kulit Tahu, Pangsit Goreng Tepung, Nasi Babi Rebus, dan Sup Mie Tulang Sapi. Semuanya fantastis dan pelayanannya juga sangat baik. Kami akan sering kembali!

reviews.author: Ben Prout
reviews.text: Very clean and relaxing space. Outstanding food, - by far the best Chinese noodle I've had in Madison!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempatnya sangat bersih dan nyaman. Makanannya luar biasa, - sejauh ini mi Cina terenak yang pernah saya makan di Madison!

reviews.author: JASON “JJ 1000PLUS” SUN
reviews.text: 那天来到这的时候已经很晚了，点了一碗牛肉面，面等了很久，久到都忘记Check了时间，耳边放着的是赵雷的歌，然后是朴树，宋东野，然后就想到了家
reviews.textTranslated: Hari itu sudah cukup larut ketika saya tiba. Saya memesan semangkuk mie daging sapi, tetapi mie itu lama sekali datang—sangat lama sampai saya lupa mengecek jam. Lagu-lagu Zhao Lei diputar di latar belakang, diikuti oleh Pu Shu dan Song Dongye, dan kemudian saya mulai memikirkan rumah.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
嗨，哲慧。感谢您给予的好评！异国他乡，知音难寻。无论是喜欢我们的食物，音乐，还是用餐环境。能让大家一解乡愁也是我们经营-胡同-的初心。
期待有机会去观赏您乐队的演出。望告知详细信息。可以微信：hutongmadison联系。谢谢！

reviews.author: Charles Denno
reviews.text: Simply one of the best meals I've ever eaten. The tofu skin and woodear mushroom dish was stunning. I think I cried a little when I tasted the broth in the spicy beef noodle soup. The execution and command of seasoning unparalleled. Perfection!! Going back tonight.
reviews.textTranslated: Ini adalah salah satu makanan terbaik yang pernah saya makan. Hidangan kulit tahu dan jamur kupingnya sungguh menakjubkan. Saya rasa saya sedikit menangis saat mencicipi kuah sup mie daging sapi pedasnya. Cara memasak dan penguasaan bumbunya tak tertandingi. Sempurna!! Akan kembali lagi malam ini.

reviews.author: David Turley
reviews.text: Traditional Chinese food. A small menu, executed exceptionally well.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan tradisional Tiongkok. Menu yang sederhana, namun disajikan dengan sangat baik.

reviews.author: Theo Gunst
reviews.text: Delish. Everything is amazing. Personally my favorite we're the cold sesame noodles, but everything is good.
reviews.textTranslated: Enak. Semuanya luar biasa. Favorit saya pribadi adalah mi wijen dinginnya, tapi semuanya enak.

reviews.author: Joseph Muenich
reviews.text:
I am so happy Zhao and Ziwen have found this magical space!
I loved it when Beth and Telly served Greek fare, and now the best Chinese food I've ever had is served from the same kitchen. The menu is small but mighty, and the beef broth is simply out of this world. I will be back again and again!
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya sangat senang Zhao dan Ziwen telah menemukan tempat ajaib ini!
Saya suka ketika Beth dan Telly menyajikan masakan Yunani, dan sekarang makanan Cina terbaik yang pernah saya makan disajikan dari dapur yang sama. Menunya kecil tapi luar biasa, dan kaldu daging sapinya benar-benar luar biasa. Saya akan kembali lagi dan lagi!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Joey,

Thank you so much for the kind words. We were closed for a personal emergency few weeks ago. We're back to normal business hours now (Closed on every Tuesday). Looking forward to seeing you again and again.  :)

-Hutong (Zhao)

reviews.author: Aubrey Woods
reviews.text: We just tried Hutong carryout for the first time and it was amazing! I enjoyed everything, especially the peanut noodles. This is my new favorite. I wish we didn't eat everything and there were leftovers for lunch tomorrow. Sadly, we ate everything! Fresh and delicious and perfectly spiced. Can't wait to order again.
reviews.textTranslated: Kami baru pertama kali coba Hutong bawa pulang dan rasanya luar biasa! Saya suka semuanya, terutama mi kacangnya. Ini favorit baru saya. Sayang sekali kami tidak menghabiskan semuanya dan masih ada sisa untuk makan siang besok. Sayangnya, kami menghabiskan semuanya! Segar, lezat, dan bumbunya pas. Tak sabar untuk pesan lagi.

reviews.author: Chyna Benzine
reviews.text: I cannot explain to you how good this restaurant is. We've ordered takeout from here almost weekly since discovering it. We've had most of the menu items now and everything is absolutely perfect. Impossible to pick a favorite but the spicy beef noodle soup is particularly wonderful on these cold winter days.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya tidak bisa menjelaskan betapa enaknya restoran ini. Kami hampir setiap minggu memesan makanan dari sini sejak menemukannya. Kami sudah mencoba hampir semua menu dan semuanya benar-benar sempurna. Sulit untuk memilih favorit, tetapi sup mie daging sapi pedasnya sangat nikmat di hari-hari musim dingin yang dingin ini.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Chyna,
Thank you so much for the kind words and support. We're looking forward to serve you again for take-out or dine in someday.
-Hutong

reviews.author: Cassidi Olson
reviews.text: Such a beautiful space! The decorations are amazing and most have a cool story to go with. Ziwen is an excellent chef, and his food is delicious. He and his wife are very friendly and made my friends and I feel right at home. Try the soju!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang sangat indah! Dekorasinya luar biasa dan sebagian besar memiliki cerita menarik di baliknya. Ziwen adalah koki yang hebat, dan masakannya lezat. Dia dan istrinya sangat ramah dan membuat saya dan teman-teman saya merasa seperti di rumah sendiri. Cobalah soju-nya!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Cassidi,
Thank you for the good review. It was pleasure to meet you. We're looking forward to serve you again.
-Zhao (Hutong)

reviews.author: Autumn Fearing
reviews.text: Get yourself and loved ones over to Hutong now! Super delicious, aromatic, perfectly seasoned and comforting menu all around.
reviews.textTranslated: Ayo, ajak diri Anda dan orang-orang terkasih ke Hutong sekarang! Menunya super lezat, aromatik, bumbunya pas, dan semuanya terasa nyaman.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Autumn,
Thank you for the good review and support! We're looking forward to serve you again.
-Hutong

reviews.author: Savannah G
reviews.text: I'm going to guess that eating in the restaurant is better than delivery because our food was not worth the price; it was not the quality you'd expect for the price so if you're thinking of doing delivery, order from someplace else.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya rasa makan di restoran lebih baik daripada pesan antar karena makanan kami tidak sepadan dengan harganya; kualitasnya tidak sesuai dengan harga yang diharapkan, jadi jika Anda berencana memesan makanan antar, pesanlah dari tempat lain.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Savannah,
Thank you for your feedback! We're sorry to hear that you're not happy with the price we have for the delivery. We offer delivery via 3rd parties, and the cost is higher due to all the charges by 3rd parties platform.  Dine-in and carry-out via our website is different than delivery. Thank you for your understanding!
-Hutong

reviews.author: Josh LaRocque
reviews.text: Excellent beef noodle soup, with richly flavored broth and perfectly cooked, almost meaty noodles. As good or better than what you can find in NYC Chinatown.
reviews.textTranslated: Sup mie daging sapi yang luar biasa, dengan kuah yang kaya rasa dan mie yang dimasak sempurna, hampir seperti daging. Sama bagusnya atau bahkan lebih baik daripada yang bisa Anda temukan di Chinatown NYC.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Hi Josh,
Thank you for the kind words about our beef noodle soup. Our kitchen staff were especially happy to read this review. We're looking forward to serve you again.
-Hutong

reviews.author: Charles Neff
reviews.text: Beef noodles and lamb skewers were out of this world. Will definitely be returning to try the rest of the menu. Highly recommend.
reviews.textTranslated: Mie sapi dan sate dombanya luar biasa. Pasti akan kembali untuk mencoba menu lainnya. Sangat direkomendasikan.

reviews.author: Gary Tipler
reviews.text: Delicious authentic food and personable service. Beautifully decorated environment.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan otentik yang lezat dan pelayanan yang ramah. Lingkungan yang didekorasi dengan indah.

reviews.author: Alice Huang
reviews.text: I rarely leave reviews, but was so impressed by my dining experience here that I had to write something. As a Chinese-American from New Jersey where there is a plethora of fantastic Chinese restaurants, I am accustomed to authentic and delicious Chinese food. I think Hutong may be the best Chinese restaurant in Madison and perhaps even one of the best Chinese restaurants I've ever eaten at (notwithstanding places I've been to in mainland China). From start to finish, my experience dining at Hutong was phenomenal. Our waitress was very attentive, the ambiance of the restaurant was lovely, and the food exquisite. My partner and I ordered the fuzhu (tofu salad), rou jia mou (pork belly bun), kou shui ji (chicken in chili oil sauce), scallion pancakes, lu rou fan (braised pork rice), and Hutong lamb skewers. I recommend them all while being slightly partial to the fuzhu, rou jia mou, and lamb skewers. I will certainly be back to try their varied noodle dishes. Truly excellent Chinese food!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya jarang menulis ulasan, tetapi sangat terkesan dengan pengalaman makan saya di sini sehingga saya harus menulis sesuatu. Sebagai warga Amerika keturunan Tionghoa dari New Jersey, tempat terdapat banyak restoran Tionghoa yang fantastis, saya terbiasa dengan makanan Tionghoa yang otentik dan lezat. Saya rasa Hutong mungkin adalah restoran Tionghoa terbaik di Madison dan mungkin bahkan salah satu restoran Tionghoa terbaik yang pernah saya kunjungi (terlepas dari tempat-tempat yang pernah saya kunjungi di Tiongkok daratan). Dari awal hingga akhir, pengalaman makan saya di Hutong sangat luar biasa. Pelayan kami sangat perhatian, suasana restoran sangat menyenangkan, dan makanannya sangat lezat. Saya dan pasangan saya memesan fuzhu (salad tahu), rou jia mou (roti isi perut babi), kou shui ji (ayam saus minyak cabai), panekuk daun bawang, lu rou fan (nasi babi rebus), dan sate domba Hutong. Saya merekomendasikan semuanya, meskipun sedikit lebih menyukai fuzhu, rou jia mou, dan sate domba. Saya pasti akan kembali untuk mencoba berbagai hidangan mie mereka. Benar-benar makanan Tionghoa yang luar biasa!

reviews.author: Taylor Helstad
reviews.text: The spicy beef noodle soup gets 10000/10 for amazing!!!! Please go visit this business, the food and staff were so nice and omg this soup will warm your insides and the FRESHNESS of everything!!!!!
reviews.textTranslated: Sup mie daging sapi pedasnya mendapat nilai 10000/10 karena sangat enak!!!! Silakan kunjungi tempat ini, makanan dan stafnya sangat ramah dan oh my god sup ini akan menghangatkan tubuh Anda dan KESEGARAN semuanya!!!!!

reviews.author: Emma Millholland
reviews.text: Really good food and service!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan dan pelayanannya sungguh enak!

reviews.author: Johnathan Ebben
reviews.text: Excellent addition to the Madison food scene. This place is a gem- we are fortunate to have here. Unique food offerings including ro jia moua is a must-try. Will be a regular here- looking forward to seeing this restaurant grow and continuing to elevate the restaurant scene in Madison.
reviews.textTranslated: Tambahan yang luar biasa untuk dunia kuliner Madison. Tempat ini sungguh istimewa—kami beruntung bisa ke sini. Hidangan uniknya, termasuk ro jia moua, wajib dicoba. Saya akan menjadi pelanggan tetap di sini—saya berharap restoran ini terus berkembang dan mengangkat dunia kuliner Madison.

reviews.author: Jennifer Li
reviews.text: Amazing food!! Must get the rou jia mo, SO mouthwatering - the other menu items are also super delicious!! Beautiful decor inside too!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya luar biasa!! Wajib coba rou jia mo, bikin ngiler banget - menu lainnya juga super enak!! Dekorasi interiornya juga cantik!

reviews.author: Karlie Wipperfurth
reviews.text: First time trying Hutong and the food was so delicious, the service was top notch from the chef to the waitress, and the atmosphere was awesome too! We ordered scallion pancakes, chinese hamburger, lamb and chicken skewers, Dan Dan noodle, and braised pork bowl. Also the plum wine was delicious! We will definitely be returning soon!
reviews.textTranslated: Ini pertama kalinya kami mencoba Hutong dan makanannya sangat lezat, pelayanannya luar biasa dari koki hingga pelayan, dan suasananya juga keren! Kami memesan panekuk daun bawang, hamburger Cina, sate domba dan ayam, mie Dan Dan, dan semangkuk babi rebus. Anggur plumnya juga enak! Kami pasti akan segera kembali!

reviews.author: Tim Becker
reviews.text:
Really high quality food! Absolutely loved the flavors and presentation of everything. Will definitely be back.

I hope they expand their menu over time
reviews.textTranslated:
Makanannya benar-benar berkualitas tinggi! Saya sangat menyukai rasa dan penyajiannya. Pasti akan kembali lagi.

Saya harap mereka memperluas menu mereka seiring waktu.

reviews.author: Nina Abuissa
reviews.text: This is the best Chinese restaurant in Madison. Everything was on point, from the delicious Dan Dan noodles to the spicy beef soup. The lamb skewers were exceptional and I highly recommend getting them. The service and music were excellent. The lighting and ambience were very cozy and welcoming, as well. We loved the food and will return again soon!
reviews.textTranslated: Ini adalah restoran Cina terbaik di Madison. Semuanya sempurna, mulai dari mi Dan Dan yang lezat hingga sup daging sapi pedas. Sate dombanya luar biasa dan saya sangat merekomendasikan untuk memesannya. Pelayanan dan musiknya sangat bagus. Pencahayaan dan suasananya juga sangat nyaman dan ramah. Kami menyukai makanannya dan akan segera kembali lagi!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Nina, thank you for the awesome review. It's glad to hear that you enjoyed our noodles and lamb skewers. We will commit to providing the same good service and more tasty dishes. Happy holidays to you and your friends!

reviews.author: Xiangyu Xia
reviews.text:
Real authentic north Chinese food
Beef noodle soup is just awesome!
reviews.textTranslated:
Makanan Tiongkok utara otentik yang sebenarnya
Sup mie daging sapi sungguh luar biasa!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Xiangyu, thank you for the awesome review and great pictures. We will commit to providing the same good service and more tasty dishes. Happy holidays to you!

reviews.author: Chris
reviews.text: Good, but the location is awkward - A bit far away from campus with no parking lot.
reviews.textTranslated: Bagus, tetapi lokasinya aneh - Agak jauh dari kampus dan tidak ada tempat parkir.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi yli, thank you for the 5 star review. Our location is in a lovely neighborhood which offers some free street parking around the area. We'll soon provide more parking information to address the concern. Happy holidays to you!

reviews.author: Trent Claybaugh
reviews.text: Absolutely phenomenal. Look no further for the best Chinese food in Madison.
reviews.textTranslated: Benar-benar fenomenal. Tak perlu mencari lagi makanan Cina terbaik di Madison.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Trent, thank you for the awesome review. You've given us meaningful supports during our soft opening. We will commit to providing more tasty dishes. Happy holidays to you!

reviews.author: Xi Wu
reviews.text: This is the only Chinese place (or should it be the only place not necessarily a Chinese place) that I really see the chef's commitment. I hope they can keep up. It is not easy. Btw , I do think the beef noodles can be more flavorful, the beef feels a bit too mundane.
reviews.textTranslated: Ini satu-satunya restoran Cina (atau mungkin satu-satunya, bukan hanya restoran Cina) yang benar-benar menunjukkan komitmen koki. Saya harap mereka bisa mempertahankan kualitasnya. Itu tidak mudah. ​​Omong-omong, menurut saya mie daging sapinya bisa lebih beraroma, daging sapinya terasa agak hambar.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Mr. Wu, thank you for the awesome review. You've given us meaningful supports during our soft opening. We will commit to providing the same good service and more tasty dishes. Our dining room is re-opened. We're looking forward to serve you again. Happy holidays to you and your family!

reviews.author: Sean Dong
reviews.text: Food was great. Would appreciate more options.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya enak. Akan saya hargai jika ada lebih banyak pilihan.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Sean, thank you for the 5 star reviews during our soft opening. We're trying to rotate different options on our small menu. The current menu, we add Lu Rou Fan and more options for Chuan. We will continue to offer more tasty dishes. Happy Holidays to you!

reviews.author: Benjamin Hoppe
reviews.text: Noodle soup with a high quality beef broth with a bit of spice. So many flavors in the broth, absolutely delicious.
reviews.textTranslated: Sup mie dengan kaldu sapi berkualitas tinggi dan sedikit bumbu. Begitu banyak rasa dalam kaldunya, benar-benar lezat.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Benjamin, it's glad to hear that you enjoyed our 18 hours beef broth. Thank you for supporting us during our soft opening. We will commit to providing the same good service and more tasty dishes. Happy holidays!

reviews.author: Z Y
reviews.text: A great new restaurant! Very authentic Chinese food and friendly staffs. Even during soft open they have already proved their quality. Hope to enjoy more tasty dish soon!
reviews.textTranslated: Restoran baru yang hebat! Makanan Cina yang sangat otentik dan staf yang ramah. Bahkan selama masa uji coba, mereka telah membuktikan kualitasnya. Semoga segera dapat menikmati lebih banyak hidangan lezat lainnya!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Xinyu, thank you for the awesome review. You've given us meaningful supports during our soft opening. We will commit to providing the same good service and more tasty dishes. Happy holidays to you!

reviews.author: Zee L
reviews.text: 味道一般 分量少点 装修还行 人手也不够 遗憾。
reviews.textTranslated: Rasanya biasa saja, porsinya agak kecil, dekorasinya oke, tapi mereka kekurangan staf. Sayang sekali.
reviews.responseFromOwner: 您好 Zee，感谢您在我们试营业期间光临本店并给与评价。祝您生活愉快！

reviews.author: Selena S
reviews.text: Love this restaurant, very fresh ingredients! The taste of the food just like the ones I have had in Beijing.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya suka restoran ini, bahan-bahannya sangat segar! Rasa makanannya persis seperti yang pernah saya makan di Beijing.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Selena, it's glad to hear that our restaurant recalled some memories you had in Beijing. It's one of our goal to create a theme of "Hutong" in Beijing. You've given us meaningful supports during our soft opening. We will commit to providing the same good service and more tasty dishes. Happy holidays!

reviews.author: Tana Ka
reviews.text: Great place to chill and have a drink and casual meal. Beef noodle soup is just awesome! we loved it soo much. Skewers are also worth a try. Will definitely revisit!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang bagus untuk bersantai, minum, dan makan santai. Sup mie daging sapinya luar biasa! Kami sangat menyukainya. Sate juga patut dicoba. Pasti akan kembali lagi!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Tana, it's glad to hear that you enjoyed our food. Thank you for your support. We will commit to providing the same good service and more tasty dishes. Happy Holidays to you!

reviews.author: steven leger
reviews.text: AMAZING food! Vegie options were thoughtfully made and true perfection. This is not your ordinary Chinese restaurant as it borders on Gourmet!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanannya LUAR BIASA! Pilihan vegetariannya dibuat dengan cermat dan benar-benar sempurna. Ini bukan restoran Cina biasa karena hampir seperti restoran Gourmet!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Steven, thank you for the awesome review. You've given us meaningful supports during our soft opening. We will commit to providing the good service and more tasty vegie options. Happy holidays to you!

reviews.author: M Rappe
reviews.text: Welcome to the Neighborhood! Lovely couple who own this restaurant making good quality food. Doing it right with a small menu and excellent food. Pancake with shank steak - amazing flavor. Dan Dan noodles had just the right amount of spice. Shrimp Shu Mai was also great.
reviews.textTranslated: Selamat datang di lingkungan kami! Pasangan yang ramah pemilik restoran ini menyajikan makanan berkualitas baik. Mereka melakukannya dengan benar meskipun menunya kecil namun makanannya luar biasa. Pancake dengan daging sapi bagian betis - rasanya luar biasa. Mie Dan Dan memiliki tingkat kepedasan yang pas. Shu Mai udang juga enak.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Mr. Pappe, thank you for the awesome review. You've given us meaningful supports on the first day of our new opening. We will commit to providing the good service and more tasty dishes. Happy holidays to you!
